| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73ac56e3-2567-447c-b549-3b11e1705f3e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Sean Feucht
subject: 5 YEARS OF GOD’S FAITHFULNESS!!! 🔥✝️🙏🏽
body:
And 3️⃣ things you can do to help!| | |
---
| | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=abc0c2acaf824d8fb775ebc6a355ad67&_e=AEf8M9Cq1_RH_WYmLRN5vSMqwaXZKfHJDdEtJDFKR0NtpfgLUSR4zBH4YSkrrLo7rw-BQP3aanNCj-2rp96E_HuINEZx4DFNBcuXiB3k-4yOBib49sfkQVQp9rGmzXPROR15QGnF29r4MuEbzt5N_tHHTfnsxxhs6cWDhPd8hQ5ht-XLgrXq8XaWic1cam8Z3uklG3tLtlAbJb0QbdgZsw8hSWTYu2qIMlXE1Qb1TOzzlV-Qibd49aervjDzb3LJpjlCvyOhBxAgCytnl4Zcv6aLaqrN8LFlRJBSoZb8TmyrpCY479tyXJbUC_mgRoANMNrmrnGF1xVG5dT3nC2u2ZzKwsvKXK-TThYbRspIlaxWJ2vUWuBYahjeOXAn1PrSxqSTFZ9kS1O4ULZHV5827I2y1sJF6e7_fVa-VTEgk4h1I5yKH_AvG3iscK2YW7hd0S7Id60mAWDu_rYo5_o3lQ%3D%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
---
It feels like yesterday, but we are celebrating FIVE YEARS of God's faithfulness!! The Government wanted the Covid-19 Pandemic to be a season of submission, darkness and despair, but God stirred hears, emboldened spirits and transformed 2020 into a season of **revival and light**. What some thought would last only a moment became a global **movement**. So as we close the chapter on the first 5 years, we faithful await the next chapter that the Lord pens onto our hearts! _And as we finish the _Revive in 25 Tour,_ I have THREE things for you to consider. _ **One:_Share this video_ : **Five years in, we’re not burned out—we’re more joyful, hopeful, and expectant than ever! We’ve faced warfare, weariness, and wild seasons—but God has been faithful. **Share the video below** and let it bless someone who needs to be reminded _: the fire is still burning!__ _ **Two:_Watch SuperSpreader:_ **If you’ve seen it before—watch it again. This wasn’t just a film; it was a movement. We raised over a million dollars to tell the story of revival in the darkest days of 2020. It hit 680 theaters, opened as a top-five film, and people encountered God right there—in the seats—with altar calls, worship, and salvations breaking out. Now it’s back on [**Amazon Prime**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=abc0c2acaf824d8fb775ebc6a355ad67&_e=AEf8M9Cq1_RH_WYmLRN5vbykIZGCN6qSAzz1wFuzpcJ1fIPAPfY4dQgGZ-OzTsm-_ENcjq4kugTZAxu9zqvStdBOomiILLjyH2gGNpxVWrYpeqNlX8_vVhpSUZVO_JZ9iBE2KNu6I6enZxx90AGQaSVm0Fx2brizmT0rIi8u2TpHtqzSumSM5Q7IyQgtnS_uvP-SLE8zs0IGUEmmBoo25uu1WdsxtXQX0DwV9LiaTvsiCnZ8a0MtlbhGoi8kvvY42ydmcml9ItPKGijiKn5RMioZkTfktB1-A3oqdP2ky7q_Nxwwtux8MavqS5V6t00tKC8OWnK931feMLdxlfkbL8lA1x_YwKk6-ZfqaFeNLi9s_ezTzz1jx54uEiyiJlocGomxtFMpzYe1J39nmS5SU6pzcYNGQHNd4ys6-B7EAZu342R7D5E47vYBFemyld9EOMIUPWHIhgogGCp5OMQ5anLcGrUWxjyeD3DjRwfWGEw39SbsZgAB6041NH7E30I7Q1vQDm45SGkPTkjmdZ_nollvyPoCMjq5SzU9SOF8mgXjbrCg3TVH0VhgXBqj-Tb4_DJeg37E-8Cy31wE4uOukNE8SkV7OVxVnQ45EmU350c%3D) and streaming at [**superspreaderfilm.com**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=abc0c2acaf824d8fb775ebc6a355ad67&_e=AEf8M9Cq1_RH_WYmLRN5vSba9Gv9c2zaDs5iH8FYb86OkSiyP98MHF-nzwPqm_jEQPXYzGt7cn6S30b_HvCVvi5O7LuEnCwiNCC2UsK0NJDZS_CrTLKYPdP5WpVIDD8DEJqM2TmonOZOXB2PnDV8UMr3KAGnLpfGejvCJjnWc6U2dpqaygSW2hT_f2uZrQUncD5JyroCSfXWvLf20A8nKLDTku1qgRByzapJXkc6fl1jSRxyPDt6GsxRJ8AhclHPrgGiMP-7CDS9xqVZdUtkY7NTmDfE9w2TpdCUGq4jVUyr0RQ0yaIGwwfkKnaS46FpHZNgQc6SJzNLqCqQz67AnAmTrj5tZjM3IcF6Bog8I-qUrUpf5bFCZKZjBzZdxP54oogDS_1PZMQY8BP2foqdvqFGTYkg9RXndPlh-eE4MeU%3D). For just a couple bucks and 78 minutes, it will stir your faith and remind you what God can do—even in the darkest hour. **If He did it in 2020... what could He do today?** **Three:_Pray for us:_ **We’re going **all in** —no slowing down—as we bring the Kingdom to cities across the nation. Doors are flying open, and God is speaking through prophetic dreams and divine appointments. We need your prayers now more than ever. Stand with us as we press forward into revival.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=abc0c2acaf824d8fb775ebc6a355ad67&_e=AEf8M9Cq1_RH_WYmLRN5vSMqwaXZKfHJDdEtJDFKR0NtpfgLUSR4zBH4YSkrrLo7rw-BQP3aanNCj-2rp96E_HuINEZx4DFNBcuXiB3k-4yOBib49sfkQVQp9rGmzXPROR15QGnF29r4MuEbzt5N_tHHTfnsxxhs6cWDhPd8hQ6PKm6Z_sWNxzwZl_rQYKlOJPL2GYUdEeyXtSHu_ojfFv9nMTDzvfZEoIRi7F29qqCziq4rbbjNz938aSpN-HQ6sN_elXVr0FjnhpXYb_QAwnXEFrapbNIiz23wNsP7f0ny2_NMl_z9JUbDlXRieEoyPzPd2_NGtBlWglnV-_xMxFG018zHp6hRx9kfNWy3-OsXLBSDyt_n03vJ_hvWM2GEZxHOwOFZAf_a32kqbdvUcGBkAhc7K1ZHZGoAiTY6OOjkN_e6ChThfAvFGDDvC9IL-86VpyZFFg24DgJ_0ddPqA%3D%3D)
---
| | The Golden Gate Bridge was the birthplace of the _Let Us Worship_ movement, but God has used the sound of worship and the call to revival to reach far beyond the borders of California—or even America! God has used _Let Us Worship_ to carry revival and worship to all 50 states and the nations. And one thing is still clear—**HE’S ONLY GETTING STARTED!** We’re not slowing down—we’ve got our foot on the gas and our hearts are bursting with expectation!
---
| | [ **SUPPORT LET US WORSHIP >>>** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=abc0c2acaf824d8fb775ebc6a355ad67&_e=AEf8M9Cq1_RH_WYmLRN5vSMqwaXZKfHJDdEtJDFKR0NtpfgLUSR4zBH4YSkrrLo7rw-BQP3aanNCj-2rp96E_HuINEZx4DFNBcuXiB3k-4yOBib49sfkQVQp9rGmzXPROR15QGnF29r4MuEbzt5N_tHHTfnsxxhs6cWDhPd8hQ5aboDNsdtBSIKY6Ona7_or8QeGdkGnaJ9e3wEPhBvdcLJYq7Z9jiA3UPiT-JBksKg4NSrSyN2iMOUokKRdv3paNoAbkwM6FQviv5qoSXvT08vQi0wSGQPUe9Y6ZvaH2nN35iqmbdgDE9ZRw1lM3qs3Rpk_fCMeIt2kw931_w3RbOwZbeIt-A_oMmOwEieJ6i3hHactDqwIoNmAHrhSmc1DVRgWl4jRjhxCnwpYhxG2h_zm41qo81hquun_3TiIXp2_QHzsVfXb7GujLncHuJxIgGips09Fbm69a0BzfQ_HwA%3D%3D)

Till all hear,

Sean

clean_body: And 3️⃣ things you can do to help!| | | | | Dear Peter, It feels like yesterday, but we are celebrating FIVE YEARS of God's faithfulness!! The Government wanted the Covid-19 Pandemic to be a season of submission, darkness and despair, but God stirred hears, emboldened spirits and transformed 2020 into a season of revival and light. What some thought would last only a moment became a global movement. So as we close the chapter on the first 5 years, we faithful await the next chapter that the Lord pens onto our hearts! And as we finish the Revive in 25 Tour, I have THREE things for you to consider. One:Share this video : Five years in, we’re not burned out—we’re more joyful, hopeful, and expectant than ever! We’ve faced warfare, weariness, and wild seasons—but God has been faithful. Share the video below and let it bless someone who needs to be reminded : the fire is still burning! Two:Watch SuperSpreader: If you’ve seen it before—watch it again. This wasn’t just a film; it was a movement. We raised over a million dollars to tell the story of revival in the darkest days of 2020. It hit 680 theaters, opened as a top-five film, and people encountered God right there—in the seats—with altar calls, worship, and salvations breaking out. Now it’s back on and streaming at . For just a couple bucks and 78 minutes, it will stir your faith and remind you what God can do—even in the darkest hour. If He did it in 2020... what could He do today? Three:Pray for us: We’re going all in —no slowing down—as we bring the Kingdom to cities across the nation. Doors are flying open, and God is speaking through prophetic dreams and divine appointments. We need your prayers now more than ever. Stand with us as we press forward into revival. | | The Golden Gate Bridge was the birthplace of the Let Us Worship movement, but God has used the sound of worship and the call to revival to reach far beyond the borders of California—or even America! God has used Let Us Worship to carry revival and worship to all 50 states and the nations. And one thing is still clear—HE’S ONLY GETTING STARTED! We’re not slowing down—we’ve got our foot on the gas and our hearts are bursting with expectation! | | Till all hear, Sean | | | | | | INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship | |

Hi Peter,

Right now we are in the height of July, so we’re experiencing what lots of campaigns call “the summer slump.” It refers to a sort of off period in July where folks aren’t as active and the support slows — and, unfortunately, this can have a big impact on our fundraising.

Just like you may need a morning caffeine boost, we also need a last-minute boost in our fundraising numbers so that Valerie can continue fighting for us in Congress and support her vulnerable Democratic colleagues to victory in 2026.

[So can you rush just $5 — the price of one cup of iced coffee — to fuel Valerie’s work and help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111453815/557308908/1371072993?amount=5&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_071425_MM03_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjc3MjdmMi1jYTYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lURthSC5luzx1slsroRVEYVcwIxQtVOOy0PwjcTatz8=) | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111453817/557308910/1371072993?amount=5&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_071425_MM03_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjc3MjdmMi1jYTYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lURthSC5luzx1slsroRVEYVcwIxQtVOOy0PwjcTatz8=)

1. **If we win in Georgia,** we end any chance Democrats have of taking the Senate Majority.

2. **This is the #1 Senate race in the country.** It’s a true tossup and polling shows that I’m the Republican who can defeat Jon Ossoff.

3. **Jon Ossoff has already raised $11 million,** at least, and he’s raising millions more from liberal megadonors to stop our campaign.

In a race that’ll come down to only a handful of votes, every single dollar we raise counts. [**That’s why I’m asking you to pitch in just $5 to show we have the grassroots support it’s going to take to win.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=2f09fd8074fd430692972d50bf17a5d8&_e=oDVhj6WNx5aQ1iBCoScc0aY0qx2vy0_8VPpPPovFzmtrbwp-TC900EHKxY5tGt7PjHZOv-DUNCzSZphA16vQZ1HvgLN8NNJO6N2choUKAuX5ZYAJsokHxiJtBkrHoQ9am9kupr0guoWSou6WoAAKc36KO0JOffl3CBfH-zz3xI8B6w5Mf8SEdbxAlQP7askVkgJwgDnHUJK7Iul5mp6-4EQYFzsfXqQfv5PJ16VO2gpJ4q4r6Q6nAL7CQT6z_hYVbBIY8xz6AbsZc5axi-2Ri0gT-oMMnTve0JNTIwwJN6h-J0JlZd-Vd46Hvxw6tBgY0gP3SuXxZXnxDnSs5XD7poJsYdPPZbR6k0p6Cf34am9oSmR0duGcD-yPY1Gvf3Co1Kikwpt-tqGzt0_qZdY9AjwqgzLeQrfM_Ggv_rQqh188CH_JlhoAQFwB4qa2mkba2l3ggIcFMlNUegkLwBRc2cHeS-ox_aNmiiuSVHH7VEoWKQEFwIa8I9XAYvvxP3WbA03f_fRQ2Zl5Tupcst-htOCI0ABfNnDfpXN5nixiDvmJy4ZlmaKdw0tPplfA6zl8izTwdKikKxHMtoMk4TgjiT73JGzBVm9esH94rLZdVG878LEiI7X3iAr_lhq6xikepGycau1dFj52OXBKzMiS1G_g59udX8oQSWMBtUKJcCL4K4KgWN5rtRSRw4dma23jQu8YbqwE6ZHXl8hIe9DxYhLFAgFFFWCRPwDSSgfQfLU%3D)

If we win in Georgia, we end any chance Democrats have of taking the Senate Majority. 2. This is the #1 Senate race in the country. It’s a true tossup and polling shows that I’m the Republican who can defeat Jon Ossoff. 3. Jon Ossoff has already raised $11 million, at least, and he’s raising millions more from liberal megadonors to stop our campaign. In a race that’ll come down to only a handful of votes, every single dollar we raise counts. This is a must-win race and I need you on my team. Thank you, Maj. Gen. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1701989/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvYVREOFlzeUdyUg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTQ/LbmNseWdCUzlMWg/qP2hpZHM9bmMwWnJTeFhuSUJYNnhscw/gaHUu0g/s3i1277f294)
| |
---
| | Dear Patriot, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) **Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1701989/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTQ/LbmNseWdCUzlMWg/qP2hpZHM9bmMwWnJTeFhuSUJYNnhscw/gaHUu0g/s4i1a44b549)

name: Obando-Derstine HQ
subject: we can’t take our eye off the ball
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carol for PA
body:
July tends to bring a dip in online fundraising, also known as the "summer slump." People take time off, donations slow down, and campaigns like ours risk losing momentum.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111456725/557319078/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-07-14_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjYyNjI5ZTUtY2U2MC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hEZAZRKp34VaxFT55iPAP6Zg5ayWtivZJhYWcrEpI6M=)
---
| Peter,

We wanted to give you a quick update on where things stand – because we need your help.

July tends to bring a dip in online fundraising, also known as the "summer slump." People take time off, donations slow down, and campaigns like ours risk losing momentum.

**But here’s the catch: Ryan Mackenzie and the NRCC aren’t taking a break, and neither can we.**

In order to keep our momentum going and push through this slump, we need your support now more than ever. We’re counting on contributions from folks like you to fund ads, hire additional staff, and make critical strategic investments that we’ll need to win.

Republicans are hoping that we’ll take our eye off the ball, so we need to show them that our movement is only getting stronger.

[_**So, can we count on you to contribute today? clean_body: July tends to bring a dip in online fundraising, also known as the "summer slump." People take time off, donations slow down, and campaigns like ours risk losing momentum. | = | Peter, We wanted to give you a quick update on where things stand – because we need your help. July tends to bring a dip in online fundraising, also known as the "summer slump." People take time off, donations slow down, and campaigns like ours risk losing momentum. But here’s the catch: Ryan Mackenzie and the NRCC aren’t taking a break, and neither can we. In order to keep our momentum going and push through this slump, we need your support now more than ever. We’re counting on contributions from folks like you to fund ads, hire additional staff, and make critical strategic investments that we’ll need to win. Republicans are hoping that we’ll take our eye off the ball, so we need to show them that our movement is only getting stronger. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Onward, Obando-Derstine HQ * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

**\---------- Forwarded message from Dr. Raul Ruiz ----------**
It's Raul.
As a doctor, I’ve seen what happens when people fall through the cracks — when care is too far, too expensive, or simply out of reach.
So when I saw what Donald Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” would do — to patients, to hospitals, to the next generation of doctors — there was no question.
**I voted no.**
I know what it means when a rural hospital shuts down. I know what it looks like when there aren’t enough doctors to go around. And now, because of this bill, students from working and middle-class families will be pushed out of medical school because they won't afford to pay.
That’s not just bad policy — **it’s dangerous for communities like ours.**
This bill will create chaos for communities across the country — all so billionaires can walk away with a massive tax break.
CA-25 is critical to flipping the House in 2026 — and that’s what it’s going to take to stop Donald Trump from doing even more damage.
[But we can only do it if we hold the line right now. We’re pushing to hit our $5,000 mid-month fundraising goal, and every single donation counts. Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111457395/557321690/863831042?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_071425_MM2_30DO30DNTL_D2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTE0NGZmZDQtY2Y2MC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pCbITr3H-yLxSKgYESNh5n5iNrWd2ttiqWknbvKKOK4=)

This is our moment to fight back — to prove that CA-25 won’t be silent while they destabilize our healthcare, our finances, and our future. As a doctor, I’ve seen what happens when people fall through the cracks — when care is too far, too expensive, or simply out of reach. So when I saw what Donald Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” would do — to patients, to hospitals, to the next generation of doctors — there was no question. I voted no. I know what it means when a rural hospital shuts down. I know what it looks like when there aren’t enough doctors to go around. And now, because of this bill, students from working and middle-class families will be pushed out of medical school because they won't afford to pay. It's worth repeating: I'm the only Democrat in the entire country who can flip a Governor's seat this year.

That's why far-right megadonors aligned with Trump watch our fundraising so closely. That's why our opponent Winsome Earle-Sears has already spent over $1 million on ads. And that's why hitting our upcoming goal is such a big deal.

_We have the momentum and we can't let up now._

As a campaign, we don't set arbitrary goals or take money from corporate PACs. Our goals are real, and we're fueled by real people like yourself giving a few bucks when called upon.

And now is the moment, Peter. _Falling behind is not an option with so much at stake for Virginia families._

# [JBS Gave Trump $5 Million. Now He's Giving Them Our Farms.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=168303047&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4MzAzMDQ3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTI1MTE1NjYsImV4cCI6MTc1NTEwMzU2NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.X9VkXRqc4xOz7ShwN6W4O5tOejGZogD8SwiQdDH5-ys)

---

Over the Fourth of July week, my wife Marilyn and I drove back and forth across Missouri on I-70. Anyone who has driven that route understands how packed it is with billboards, for everything from strip clubs to cannabis shops.
One billboard, however, stood out among the others, for the darkness of its message.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.A79_Ykq-8Piuhbb83hSbmqMZfPjo09EFC6N8r9zER1c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168303047)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f49bd65b-1f09-4159-9528-c9b10c0a3d26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Apparently we don't have control over our state if we aren't letting big ag run free.
The twisted appeal to freedom is clear: none of us are free if big-ag isn't free.
Emblematic of the ["Triumph of Doubt"](https://substack.com/redirect/c7f787a7-4a7f-4cd4-806f-705c8b9241e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) society we have built, and the power of large corporations, particularly big ag, the billboard urges Missourians to protect our state by "standing up" for a foreign big-ag conglomerate (Bayer) that is [literally killing us](https://substack.com/redirect/13563d3d-ab01-4634-a4b7-8891bb2cadaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). (While using corrupt scientists, regulatory lobbying, and media campaigns [to sow just enough doubt](https://substack.com/redirect/2d20499e-b89d-4543-b3cc-d5e85cdacf8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to keep it around)
Marilyn, who works at the Natural Resources Defense Council, was furious. She has been watching foreign big-ag corporations buy off our politicians in order to destroy our state and suck the wealth out of our land and ship it overseas. Today, she talks about the Trump administration's deep ties to one of these companies and the way the Trump administration is seeking to let them destroy small farmers.
-Lucas
* * *
I grew up on a farm.
My parents worked sunup to sundown, season after season, to keep it alive. And still, it wasn't enough. I was too young to remember the struggle my parents went through, I only remember moving out of it and that my dad was really sad about leaving it behind. Later on, I learned that we needed help the most that year, when we were on the brink, staring down impossible choices, and we didn't get any. Not from the banks. Not from the government. Certainly not from the people in charge of regulating the industry.
We lost the farm. And to this day, I believe that if the conditions then looked anything like what we're facing now, there wouldn't have even been a fight. Big Ag would have taken it clean. Because for every day farmers like my parents, we don't ever get a break. Unlike the big guys. They get it all, every time.
That's why I began working in an environmental group, and that's why Trump's [long-running rollback of agriculture and antitrust rules](https://substack.com/redirect/a1f1af5c-07d9-4887-9299-111b0811eac2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) hits so close to home. Because I know what it means when the system stops protecting small producers. I know what it feels like to be squeezed out while the biggest players get every break in the book.
And already, in the first six months of Trump's second administration, JBS, the largest meatpacker in the world, is quietly winning yet another round.
None of this should come as a shock. The Trump administration has never hidden where its loyalties lie, especially when it comes to big corporations that write big checks. A recent Federal Election Commission filing revealed that Pilgrim's Pride, a U.S. subsidiary of JBS, [made a $5 million donation to Trump's second inaugura](https://substack.com/redirect/183d9a06-6dad-44b1-96d7-c730e37083ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)l committee, the largest single contribution recorded. It wasn't just generosity, either. The return on investment played out in real time as JBS [quickly received approval for it's previously stalled IPO](https://substack.com/redirect/183d9a06-6dad-44b1-96d7-c730e37083ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) despite significant [evidence of corruption, monopoly practices, and other serious issues that could expose investors to outsized risk](https://substack.com/redirect/ee8a4391-5d80-455a-9760-902ff45dadb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
If it wasn't already clear, it is now: the White House is up for sale, and Big Ag is buying.
While most of the media is busy trying to keep up with the Trump's administration circus, big ag is quietly preparing to [dismantle the USDA's Packers and Stockyards Act reforms](https://substack.com/redirect/c5b495a2-2909-4660-838b-02db9e140ed9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the very rules designed to level the playing field between independent farmers and the corporate meatpacking giants like JBS, Tyson, and Cargill.
Under the Biden administration, the USDA worked to restore key GIPSA (Grain Inspection, Packers and Stockyards Administration) provisions that protected small and mid-sized producers and that the first Trump administration [had gutted](https://substack.com/redirect/da562959-7d41-413d-a70c-f531638077c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). They tried to address the fact that just four companies control over 80% of the beef in the US market, a staggering level of concentration that's led to lower prices for farmers and higher prices for consumers.
Let's be clear: these aren't "regulations hurting the free market." These are the last remaining guardrails trying to preserve a free market at all.
Companies like JBS use their scale and influence to suppress competition, dictate contract terms, retaliate against anyone who speaks out, and [artificially inflate the price of beef in the supermarket](https://substack.com/redirect/c900355f-7776-4e1d-b7c0-07aac95cb170?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Big Ag just keeps winning while the rest of us, like my family growing up, just keep losing.
One of Trump's campaigns promises that he is also breaking by supporting JBS, is to support American businesses. **JBS is a Brazilian company. And its goal is to suck the wealth out of the land in places like Missouri: nearly half of its global revenue comes from the United States.** American cattle, American land, and American labor generate massive profits for this foreign-owned conglomerate that gives very little back to the communities it relies on.
Missouri farmers aren't seeing those profits. Neither are the local economies trying to hold on to a shrinking agricultural base. What they are seeing is market power so concentrated that a single company can dictate prices, control access to processing facilities, and push out any competitor that doesn't play by its rules. There is no competition. Just corporate feudalism dressed up as capitalism.
And it's only getting worse. JBS has aggressively expanded its U.S. footprint through acquisitions and vertically integrated control of every stage of its meat supply chain. They own everything from slaughterhouses to trucking fleets to feed mills. For small farmers already struggling with razor-thin margins, this means less choice, less leverage, and fewer paths to market. If the current Trump administration continues down the same path as the last one, JBS won't just dominate the meat industry. They will crush the remaining independent producers who are hanging on by a thread.
If protecting American farms wasn't a good enough reason, JBS's history should be enough to give any lawmaker pause. JBS has been tied to some of the largest corruption scandals in Brazil's history, including Operation Car Wash, a massive bribery investigation that implicated company executives in paying off politicians and laundering money through fake contracts. Here in the U.S., JBS and its subsidiaries have faced numerous lawsuits for price-fixing, worker exploitation, and fraud. This is not a company that operates with transparency or public interest in mind. It is a company that buys influence, crushes competition, and shrugs off the law as a cost of doing business.
And beyond the courtroom, the consequences reach into the Amazon. JBS has been repeatedly linked to illegal deforestation in Brazil, where its beef supply chain has fueled environmental destruction on a global scale. The company promised reforms, but satellite evidence and investigative reporting tell a different story, and after president Trump's election, the company back tracked on their word, saying that 'they never made a pledge'.
Why would we let a company that behaves so badly in its own backyard to come here and jack up our country?
This is what a rigged system looks like. A corrupt foreign-owned meatpacking giant funneling millions into Trump's political machine, getting special treatment from Washington, and sucking the wealth out of rural America.
So many farm families, just like mine, have been crushed during the last few decades of consolidation. And it hurts so much to see it continue with no end in sight.
_Daughter of a farm family,_
Marilyn Kunce

How Trump hooking up a foreign-owned giant is a death sentence for small-town America. | | | Jul 14 | | | | | | | | | | | | Over the Fourth of July week, my wife Marilyn and I drove back and forth across Missouri on I-70. Anyone who has driven that route understands how packed it is with billboards, for everything from strip clubs to cannabis shops. One billboard, however, stood out among the others, for the darkness of its message. Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. name: Message from Trump
subject: I just tried to call you.
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205fgupqhaq2y42tayuy5t4bj1dp6klvdkrrgfmcuqj64usqhglpj30o4javx4y6gnt98y69kmjojkyoyxz&__stmp=szeemi&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szeemi&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol01r89unh9t6ted7ganltndlabrxxegt485i5v565e9afp80hxjvv8stirar1jj377224ao9eacufmxaktl1c8ihq6alshhbmbfm7c19nd2vpd204ha61i2ofleszrifz12fvy9lepb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szeemi&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szeemi&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szeemi&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szeemi&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol01r89unh9t6ted7ganltndlabrxxegt485i5v565e9afp80hxjvv8stirar1jj377224ao9eacufmxaktl1c8ihq6alshhbmbfm7c19nd2vpd204ha61i2ofleszrifz12fvy9lepb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szeemi&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szeemi&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

As the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee, I’ve seen what Republicans have let top Trump Administration officials get away with.
**But when Democrats retake the House Majority in 2026, that’s all going to change:**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111458406/557324995/789508428?refcode=250714_RG_accountability&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTYwMTQ3ZS1kMjYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82Agy_dFiIZjNdJOskbSkaeKcrVAa1cVBQTdv4sQjNs=)**
People like Stephen Miller have been trampling all over the rule of law and our Constitution.
And what have House Republicans on the Oversight Committee done about it? _**Absolutely nothing.**_
They’re all too happy to let Donald Trump and his evil minions violate due process and sow distrust of the courts in service of their horrific agenda.
But I take Congress’s oversight powers seriously — and so do my Democratic colleagues. Together, we will restore accountability and stand up for the rule of law.
**[But first, we need to win back the majority — and that starts with grassroots champions like you chipping in $10, $25, or more right now. Can I count on you to join me in taking a stand? Together, let’s put the House back in Democratic hands.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111458407/557324996/789508428?refcode=250714_RG_accountability&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTYwMTQ3ZS1kMjYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82Agy_dFiIZjNdJOskbSkaeKcrVAa1cVBQTdv4sQjNs=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111458408/557324997/-309737922?refcode=250714_RG_accountability&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTYwMTQ3ZS1kMjYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82Agy_dFiIZjNdJOskbSkaeKcrVAa1cVBQTdv4sQjNs=)

clean_body: = As the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee, I’ve seen what Republicans have let top Trump Administration officials get away with. But when Democrats retake the House Majority in 2026, that’s all going to change: = People like Stephen Miller have been trampling all over the rule of law and our Constitution. And what have House Republicans on the Oversight Committee done about it? Absolutely nothing. They’re all too happy to let Donald Trump and his evil minions violate due process and sow distrust of the courts in service of their horrific agenda. But I take Congress’s oversight powers seriously — and so do my Democratic colleagues. Together, we will restore accountability and stand up for the rule of law. = = Thank you, Robert = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . name: Ritchie Torres
subject: re: Growing up next to a Donald Trump golf course
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111458410/557325001/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjhkMWM5ZC1kMjYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WY3P8Pt2NaoY4Wx7IjgR-t9N5mihPBoyXodB0WXlvlI=)
---
Peter, I grew up across the street from one of Donald Trump's golf courses in New York. This one, in fact: ↘↘ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111458411/557325002/-721819307?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250714_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjhkMWM5ZC1kMjYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WY3P8Pt2NaoY4Wx7IjgR-t9N5mihPBoyXodB0WXlvlI=) Yes, really. But it was not the way I think you're picturing it in your mind — let me explain.

I didn't live in a skyrise apartment or a mansion with luxuries at my fingertips.

**I grew up in the Throggs Neck Houses, a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump's Golf Course in The Bronx.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111458412/557325003/-721819307?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250714_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjhkMWM5ZC1kMjYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WY3P8Pt2NaoY4Wx7IjgR-t9N5mihPBoyXodB0WXlvlI=) My mom was a single mom, working multiple jobs to keep food on the table. I'm so grateful for how much she sacrificed to provide for our family.

Living across from Trump's Golf Course, I had to see a reminder every day of how easily and often our government supports and enables the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working families.

You see, the New York City government shoveled over _$100 million in government aid_ to develop this golf course with Donald Trump and the corrupt Trump Organization. _They did this while New York families like mine lived in hunger and poverty across the street._

But, I always try to look at the positives — growing up smelling the stench of Donald Trump (even before he became president) has led me to where I am today: **Fighting in Congress for justice for real working families.**

When I work on legislation, I always think about the families who are struggling just like mine did. I lived that experience — it is not abstract to me. And I'll never forget it.

I hope you feel like you have a better sense of who I am and what my values are. I swear that I'm fighting for those values every day in Congress.

Right now, the threat of Trump and his MAGA cult looms large. They're determined to strip our right to vote, give tax breaks to people like Trump, and put special interests ahead of working families _– and they’re raising millions to pull it off._

But we have something they don’t, Peter: A powerful grassroots movement made up of working people, not faceless corporations. [**Can I count on you to join our coalition today by chipping in $3 toward our $15,000 Mid-Month goal? If hundreds of people like you each chip in what you can afford, I know we can take on their dark money and handle whatever the GOP trifecta throws our way. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111458413/557325004/-721819307?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250714_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjhkMWM5ZC1kMjYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WY3P8Pt2NaoY4Wx7IjgR-t9N5mihPBoyXodB0WXlvlI=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111458420/557325011/-721819307?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20250714_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjhkMWM5ZC1kMjYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WY3P8Pt2NaoY4Wx7IjgR-t9N5mihPBoyXodB0WXlvlI=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Team Miyares
subject: Protecting fentanyl dealers? Seriously?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
This November, Virginians face a clear choice.| | | Friend,

**Jay Jones voted to protect fentanyl dealers.** **Jason Miyares put them behind bars.**

In 2019, fentanyl overdoses were ripping families apart across Virginia. Jason Miyares led a bipartisan charge to crack down on drug dealers by making it a felony to sell deadly drugs, like fentanyl, that kill Virginians.

**Jay Jones voted no.**

He sided with criminals over victims. Jason declared fentanyl a national security threat, launched the One Pill Can Kill campaign, and helped **drop overdoses by 38.4%,[_one of the best results in the country._](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/VYNWPKZy0igAtxrK6fn8aDdbyZ_VAKOtV_KhasUTdFwQ4GGhHbc3V7J9QEwkV-O2hHNb874Xlv88hMKhU_nNGTI5VIbjN8xdQLJB9EGhD_E07AJhBZHWeaBoftTyxiiLZl2BWYVhPXLtPJdt9Sl7InSzxqs9Mx2uCgjZ6GCUnZocJQeqNo2l5YAILJ1QQROH4vhdm2lv31T6m7WLrXUbiD9xmp4btEmjDsacvUtnVgUcvWr3GfKu-R202AYEcdsYdbnl0_G1jDlvbij-H_TIBA13KJMxFpU1fWzSEYUTS7-BEXtdxwjnRNtHK_3F0efka1sj9oMHGAGv4SZNL229V5Vk9_S6ImRA9gbmUXVx5temu0EuWWkYhzkhMMaroY8iBDt6OOe_koBwieozvp92e5IYMlM0hNw3uyUFbicc5-4ugn28IPsDBTaeIPpfYKYY8CNqgk4ESuPcx6h2susX1t2KOdWp72_pxQRn8mNyLL_wtYK3fp1RG3DbyxIlFbAS_v4o8poCb7IZ9qgXq5f7kvjcPWKwmUOSX-yijiACCNGTsnoaRvuguCgB-a7zrwUCcHdabC8-6m2sJhXROVUS/GiTgge_JCPaYNu_H57FnOnrF3xWXZoy1/10)**

Jay Jones talks like a progressive. Jason Miyares acts like a protector.

This November, Virginians face a clear choice.

In 2019, fentanyl overdoses were ripping families apart across Virginia. Jason Miyares led a bipartisan charge to crack down on drug dealers by making it a felony to sell deadly drugs, like fentanyl, that kill Virginians. Jay Jones voted no. He sided with criminals over victims. Jason declared fentanyl a national security threat, launched the One Pill Can Kill campaign, and helped drop overdoses by 38.4%, Jay Jones talks like a progressive. Jason Miyares acts like a protector. This November, Virginians face a clear choice. — Team Miyares | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

_The Voter Protection Project_

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Tony Johnson
subject: Confirm your information
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205fguq8r0rh9q08kvmi7e9yoxnideufiitn2k2wiuo0dve6tdcicdejzz26keocifwtggmhseh4cvgzhjs&__stmp=szefjy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szefjy&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol01r8nve52n6bxr3fg9xbbsb577ub1rf94wjvwn8mcglwna0u959zrj1yacclta2lxhzuxk7fv8891ryevc5qe89kjrwnnd3pcalrhjxxsg1v2cij9qso96bxdbf9yypufggueb65by&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szefjy&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szefjy&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szefjy&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szefjy&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol01r8nve52n6bxr3fg9xbbsb577ub1rf94wjvwn8mcglwna0u959zrj1yacclta2lxhzuxk7fv8891ryevc5qe89kjrwnnd3pcalrhjxxsg1v2cij9qso96bxdbf9yypufggueb65by&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szefjy&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szefjy&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi there, Peter. I'm Janelle Stelson, the Democrat running to oust Scott Perry in PA-10 — a major tossup district. In 2024, this was the second closest race in the entire country — we lost by just 5,133 votes. We can flip this district from red to blue this time, but it is going to take every single one of us. = | | = If my name and face are familiar, it's not just because I ran for Congress in 2024. For more than 30 years, I was a TV news anchor, uplifting the stories of Central Pennsylvanians. I flew over New York City with the Pennsylvania National Guard after 9/11, delivered the heartbreaking news that Roe v. Wade had been overturned on live television, and shared the stories of businesses closing, job losses, and families struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads. I am a dedicated truth teller with decades of experience standing up for our neighbors. Now I am working to replace former Freedom Caucus Chair and MAGA insurrectionist Scott Perry. ❌ He has praised the GOP budget bill that just passed. You know — the one that will kick millions of hard-working Americans off Medicaid, shutter rural hospitals, and give tax cuts to the wealthy 1%. ❌ He has supported a national abortion ban with no exceptions. ❌ He helped plan the January 6th insurrection, where Americans lost their lives. Scott Perry is too extreme for PA-10, and we deserve better. Peter: PA-10 is a make-or-break district to flip the U.S. House. We have a serious shot at winning this district, but my opponent is backed by mountains of dark money and billionaire donors. The support of grassroots donors like you is crucial to our success. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Help us launch this campaign with the momentum we need to oust Scott Perry once and for all. With gratitude, Janelle * | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. Now, he's helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. Can you chip in today to help? | = = Paid for by Friends of Austin Davis Friends of Austin Davis PO Box 304 McKeesport, PA 15134 United States If you need to unsubscribe,

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Why I went to jail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
The answer is simple.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111460597/557332423/1328794144?refcode=ea.621ae96d-d660-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.621ae96d-d660-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMWFlOTZkLWQ2NjAtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=D5DySSf1fuUUXR2w-yPNepeweIc3Jqgz7kdlDJqOWtw=&emci=8f6a6a43-685e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=621ae96d-d660-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
I’ll never forget stepping out of the D.C. jail that chilly morning in 2019. I’d just been released after protesting on the steps of the Capitol for climate action. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111460598/557332424/2105508926?refcode=ea.621ae96d-d660-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.621ae96d-d660-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMWFlOTZkLWQ2NjAtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=D5DySSf1fuUUXR2w-yPNepeweIc3Jqgz7kdlDJqOWtw=)_Photo by Victoria Pickering_ As I started to leave, a Fox TV reporter rushed over and stuck a mic in my face while his camera rolled. "Why have you done this, gone to jail?" he asked with an edge in his voice. "To get you to cover climate," I replied. **That exchange captures exactly why I've put my body on the line over and over again — to force people to pay attention to the crisis that's staring us all in the face.** But I knew that raising awareness wouldn’t be enough. The more I learned about the climate crisis, the more I realized that building a community was essential to growing the movement needed to change the way this country does business. Protesting got people’s attention. It forced conversations. But nothing is going to change at the scale we need if we don't change the people in power. That’s why I started JanePAC. My goal was to move people from concern to action, and that’s why I’m grateful to you, friend. This community is proof that we’re not in this fight alone. Together, we’re backing candidates who aren’t afraid to take on corporate polluters. Leaders who understand that science demands urgency. Morality demands courage. And the moment demands boldness. As Trump and his MAGA allies auction off our planet to the highest bidder, we can’t afford to sit on the sidelines anymore. We need to keep pushing for leaders in office who understand that the window to prevent climate catastrophe is closing fast. **[I may be 87 years old, but I’m not slowing down. And I hope you won’t either. We've set a goal to raise $30,000 by Wednesday night to power our critical work ahead, and we're counting on supporters like you to help us get there. Will you join me in this fight by chipping in whatever you can? Together, we can turn our anger into the political change our planet desperately needs.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111460599/557332425/2105508926?refcode=ea.621ae96d-d660-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.621ae96d-d660-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMWFlOTZkLWQ2NjAtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=D5DySSf1fuUUXR2w-yPNepeweIc3Jqgz7kdlDJqOWtw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111460600/557332426/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.621ae96d-d660-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.621ae96d-d660-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMWFlOTZkLWQ2NjAtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=D5DySSf1fuUUXR2w-yPNepeweIc3Jqgz7kdlDJqOWtw=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111460601/557332427/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.621ae96d-d660-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.621ae96d-d660-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMWFlOTZkLWQ2NjAtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=D5DySSf1fuUUXR2w-yPNepeweIc3Jqgz7kdlDJqOWtw=)

clean_body: The answer is simple. | I’ll never forget stepping out of the D.C. jail that chilly morning in 2019. I’d just been released after protesting on the steps of the Capitol for climate action. by Victoria Pickering As I started to leave, a Fox TV reporter rushed over and stuck a mic in my face while his camera rolled. "Why have you done this, gone to jail?" he asked with an edge in his voice. "To get you to cover climate," I replied. That exchange captures exactly why I've put my body on the line over and over again — to force people to pay attention to the crisis that's staring us all in the face. But I knew that raising awareness wouldn’t be enough. The more I learned about the climate crisis, the more I realized that building a community was essential to growing the movement needed to change the way this country does business. Protesting got people’s attention. It forced conversations. But nothing is going to change at the scale we need if we don't change the people in power. That’s why I started JanePAC. My goal was to move people from concern to action, and that’s why I’m grateful to you, friend. This community is proof that we’re not in this fight alone. Together, we’re backing candidates who aren’t afraid to take on corporate polluters. Leaders who understand that science demands urgency. Morality demands courage. And the moment demands boldness. As Trump and his MAGA allies auction off our planet to the highest bidder, we can’t afford to sit on the sidelines anymore. We need to keep pushing for leaders in office who understand that the window to prevent climate catastrophe is closing fast. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Peter — Trump called it his “one big, beautiful bill.” But here in Pennsylvania, the _“big, bullsh*t bill”_ could obliterate the food assistance program that helps more than 2 million of our neighbors put food on the table. That’s kids. That’s seniors. That’s disabled Pennsylvanians. That’s working people who’ve already been squeezed by rising costs and stagnant wages.

Under this bill, the state would be forced to scramble for as much as $800 million just to keep SNAP benefits going. If lawmakers can’t come up with that cash fast, through massive tax hikes, brutal cuts to other programs, or both, families will lose access to the most basic form of stability: knowing where their next meal is coming from.

**Let’s be clear:** this was the plan all along. And every single Republican from Pennsylvania helped make it happen.

Here’s the hit list:
* Sen. Dave McCormick
* Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick (PA-01)
* Rep. Ryan Mackenzie (PA-07)
* Rep. Rob Bresnahan Jr. (PA-08)
* Rep. Dan Meuser (PA-09)
* Rep. Scott Perry (PA-10)
* Rep. Lloyd Smucker (PA-11)
* Rep. John Joyce (PA-13)
* Rep. Guy Reschenthaler (PA-14)
* Rep. Glenn Thompson (PA-15)
* Rep. Mike Kelly (PA-16)

These are the people who voted to gut SNAP and Medicaid — just to extend tax cuts for billionaires.

These are the people who made a choice: **Tax breaks for the rich > Food for working families
Cuts to healthcare > Support for the disabled
Political cruelty > Basic human decency ** We can’t let this stand. name: Rick Larsen
subject: What does the Big Ugly Bill mean for Northwest Washington?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Last week, I spent my time traveling around Northwest Washington state to understand the impact of the Big Ugly Bill.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111460932/557333957/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODViMzQzNC1kODYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bsyp2b4IQRX3HjN0NE1EfOndv7BH2EacOgf3udA6L6k=&emci=f4d5e6bb-755e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d85b3434-d860-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Last week, I spent my time at home talking to local health care providers and food banks about how the Republicans' Big Ugly Bill will impact our friends and neighbors.** **There is a reason why I call the legislation that passed earlier this month the Big Ugly Bill.** The impact of this bill is going to be pretty ugly when more than **328,000 people** in our state will lose access to health insurance due to Medicaid cuts or the loss of the premium tax credit, which supports the purchase of health insurance. **Medicaid provides health coverage to 1.5 million Washingtonians, 20.3% of all Washingtonians.** This is a breakdown of who relies on Medicaid for health coverage in Washington:
* **38.3%** of all children
* **35%** of moms giving birth and their newborn babies
* **39.8%** of working-age adults with disabilities
* **59%** of people living in nursing homes
* **15%** of Medicare beneficiaries
* **16.1** % of adults aged 19-64

**The cuts from the Big Ugly Bill are going to hurt our friends and neighbors.** We are already hearing that PeaceHealth St. Joseph Medical Center in Bellingham expects to see more people without health insurance coming to the emergency room for health care. At the Everett Food Bank, staff are expecting to see longer lines and less food because of the Big Ugly Bill. **Republicans are cutting the federal food assistance program by 20%, the largest cut in history.** This bill is set to roll out for the next 10 years and will continue to be a rolling thunder of bad news for Northwest Washington.**Even though this bill passed, I will be spending a lot of my time trying to stop these devastating cuts from happening.** _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

clean_body: Last week, I spent my time traveling around Northwest Washington state to understand the impact of the Big Ugly Bill. | | | | Last week, I spent my time at home talking to local health care providers and food banks about how the Republicans' Big Ugly Bill will impact our friends and neighbors. There is a reason why I call the legislation that passed earlier this month the Big Ugly Bill. The impact of this bill is going to be pretty ugly when more than 328,000 people in our state will lose access to health insurance due to Medicaid cuts or the loss of the premium tax credit, which supports the purchase of health insurance. Medicaid provides health coverage to 1.5 million Washingtonians, 20.3% of all Washingtonians. This is a breakdown of who relies on Medicaid for health coverage in Washington: 38.3% of all children 35% of moms giving birth and their newborn babies 39.8% of working-age adults with disabilities 59% of people living in nursing homes 15% of Medicare beneficiaries 16.1 % of adults aged 19-64 The cuts from the Big Ugly Bill are going to hurt our friends and neighbors. We are already hearing that PeaceHealth St. Joseph Medical Center in Bellingham expects to see more people without health insurance coming to the emergency room for health care. At the Everett Food Bank, staff are expecting to see longer lines and less food because of the Big Ugly Bill. Republicans are cutting the federal food assistance program by 20%, the largest cut in history. This bill is set to roll out for the next 10 years and will continue to be a rolling thunder of bad news for Northwest Washington.Even though this bill passed, I will be spending a lot of my time trying to stop these devastating cuts from happening.
