You know — the one that will kick millions of hard-working Americans off Medicaid, shutter rural hospitals, and give tax cuts to the wealthy 1%. ❌ He has supported a national abortion ban with no exceptions. ❌ He helped plan the January 6th insurrection, where Americans lost their lives. Scott Perry is too extreme for PA-10, and we deserve better. Derek: PA-10 is a make-or-break district to flip the U.S. House. We have a serious shot at winning this district, but my opponent is backed by mountains of dark money and billionaire donors. The support of grassroots donors like you is crucial to our success. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Help us launch this campaign with the momentum we need to oust Scott Perry once and for all. With gratitude, Janelle | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@chrisforpa.com** to your address book. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you no longer want to receive our messages, you can . Chris Deluzio is a United States veteran. Use of rank, title, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, Department of the Navy or the Department of the Army. | PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States

name: Senator Rand Paul
subject: FW: End of the UN Arms Treaty in sight
body:
[unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166j32nk1khhb3zifid9c7zay4z80llkaf8tvdztjp8gultuf3lz2jky4hkq6c6tscgnkwv8sogsf5b58iad59a&__stmp=szegr7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|

Dear Fellow Patriot,

The United Nations’ “Small Arms Treaty” has been the Gun Control Lobby’s crown jewel since Barack Obama sent it to the U.S. Senate and insisted we ratify it a decade ago. Year after year, we refused.

_But each and every day, the UN is getting closer to implementing the terms of this dangerous Treaty’s provisions here in the United States even without ratification_.

**And it’s all being done in secret by the UN’s allies in the Washington, D.C. “Swamp.”**

The good news is, with the big changes in Washington due to the 2024 election, you and I have a chance to stop the Gun Control Lobby cold.

But it’s an opportunity that won’t last forever.

That’s why – as Dudley Brown, President of the National Association for Gun Rights, explains in the message below – **[it’s absolutely critical you and I act now](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=2kizc47bzflzd0nv9qimu327wd6985vskamuvig80vymheexoeetl4wo8ubofgk889xurzq2hstqdxvjm64xjsjcxqbpo8yv1dzuhpd16mn0jlugsgxnk3hqlt0qkaou5y4d092lk5om4pd8jqwpplzilnxor2ke0bg306ox5gzt3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szegr7&__onlt=h)**!

**Sincerely,

The Hon. Rand Paul
United States Senator (R-KY)**

* * *

Dear Fellow Patriot,

**There is a sword hanging over the head of every American gun owner**.

I’m referring to the UN “Small Arms Treaty” -- the first stage of the UN’s global gun control agenda.

_I’ve stared these global gun banners in the face and told them what they could do with their precious “Small Arms Treaty,” though I knew the UN would NOT like me crashing their “Gun Ban Club” in Geneva_.

**_I told UN bureaucrats you and I will NEVER surrender to their anti-gun schemes!_**

When I told these anti-gun international bureaucrats they were walking in the footsteps of every 20th century murderous dictator who disarmed their citizens to shuffle them off to death camps, I guess my words hit a little “close to home.”

All they could do in response was squirm in their seats and laugh nervously...

But while you or I or even President Trump can tell these gun grabbers what we think of their treaty, only the U.S. Senate can remove the treaty document from the Senate agenda.

**[That’s why I’m counting on you to sign your “END THE UN GUN BAN” petition to your U.S. Senators IMMEDIATELY](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=2kizc47bzflzd0nv9qimu327wd6985vskamuvig80vymheexoeetl4wo8ubofgk889xurzq2hstqdxvjm64xjsjcxqbpo8yv1dzuhpd16mn0jlugsgxnk3hqlt0qkaou5y4d092lk5om4pd8jqwpplzilnxor2ke0bg306ox5gzt3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szegr7&__onlt=h)**.

As you’ll see, this petition insists your Senators act to oppose and reject the UN “Small Arms Treaty” and send it back to the President where it can be formally and finally trashed.

But until they do, the UN “Small Arms Treaty” will remain pending in the Senate, and ratification by a future Senate is all that’s needed for this gun grab to become reality.

_And that’s REGARDLESS of who occupies the White House or their position on the Treaty_!

With this Treaty, the UN’s goal is to DESTROY the legal buying, owning, manufacturing, and selling of pistols, rifles, and shotguns by FORCING: **> > _ALL countries involved in the export of firearms -- including the United States -- to establish a “National Control System_.”** This is nothing more than GUN REGISTRATION, plain and simple -- the first step toward outright GUN CONFISCATION; **> > _ALL firearms manufacturers who seek to export firearms to ask for permission and report on how they believe the guns they sell will be used_.** The UN ultimately wants final say on whether or not any firearms transfer should be allowed. Period. After all, they are fixated on keeping guns out of the hands of the “wrong” people; and **> > _ALL Treaty countries to allow firearms manufacturers to be sued for crimes committed with their products_.** Imagine how outrageous it would be if Ford was sued because an F-150 owner ran a red light and caused a crash! That’s what gun grabbers want to do with firearms because they know this could END gun manufacturing. This is exactly what Mexico is attempting to do in their lawsuit against Smith & Wesson.
**_The UN’s ultimate plan for all civilian-owned guns:_Incinerate them_._**

It’s hard to see how the Second Amendment could survive in the United States were the one-world socialists at the UN to get their way.

Of course, that’s their goal.

_To them, your Second Amendment freedoms are a threat to their grand “utopian” designs_.

Meanwhile, enemies like Red China are so eager to see every American disarmed, they’re pouring money into the UN “Small Arms Treaty” hand-over-fist.

So, it’s no wonder why they’re hell-bent on forcing the U.S. to submit to this globalist gun control scam -- and why we must defeat it!

**[I’m counting on you to help beat the UN by signing your “END THE UN GUN BAN” petition to urge your U.S. Senators to end all support for the UN Gun Ban and send it back to the White House right away](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=2kizc47bzflzd0nv9qimu327wd6985vskamuvig80vymheexoeetl4wo8ubofgk889xurzq2hstqdxvjm64xjsjcxqbpo8yv1dzuhpd16mn0jlugsgxnk3hqlt0qkaou5y4d092lk5om4pd8jqwpplzilnxor2ke0bg306ox5gzt3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szegr7&__onlt=h)**.

If we don’t dispose of the treaty quickly, the gun grabbers will leap to ratify the Treaty in the U.S. Senate the moment they have the votes, no matter who the President is or what their stance is on the treaty.

_That’s why we have to mount a massive campaign to send this Treaty back to the President NOW so he can kill the Treaty as promised, before it’s too late_.

The great news is, just doing so puts you and me in a win/win situation.

Either we get the 60 votes we need to finally KILL this Treaty...

... Or anti-gun U.S. Senators will be on record in support of arguably the **WORST anti-gun initiative** to come before either chamber of Congress in decades.

Believe me.

_U.S. Senators who vote to allow international bureaucrats to trample on our gun rights will pay the price at the ballot box_.

Just like they did in 2014 after their all-out push for gun control in the wake of the Newtown tragedy, and in 2016 after Hillary Clinton’s full embrace of every anti-gun policy imaginable, and in **2024 when four anti-gun democrats went down in flames, and four more barely hung on by the skin of their teeth**.

_But if we don’t fight now, it could be the gun grabbers who get the last laugh -- even if it takes them years to regain control of the U.S. Senate_!

After all, gun grabbers have been battling for this scheme since President Bill Clinton’s administration.

_They’re going to do whatever it takes to make their global gun control crown jewel a reality_.

They’re clearly in this for the long haul.

Are you?

**[Click here to sign your “END THE UN GUN BAN” Petition and insist the U.S. Senate vote to return the treaty to President Trump so he can send it to the trash where it belongs](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=2kizc47bzflzd0nv9qimu327wd6985vskamuvig80vymheexoeetl4wo8ubofgk889xurzq2hstqdxvjm64xjsjcxqbpo8yv1dzuhpd16mn0jlugsgxnk3hqlt0qkaou5y4d092lk5om4pd8jqwpplzilnxor2ke0bg306ox5gzt3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szegr7&__onlt=h)**.

Sadly, the UN “Small Arms Treaty” is now only the beginning of the problem.

_Under Joe Biden’s direction, one-world bureaucrats are even now pushing key parts of these gun controls deep into every part of government_.

On top of the Biden ATF’s anti-gun executive actions, a headline from The Hill showed how **“Democrats’ latest backdoor plan to limit gun ownership”** involves new State Department “sanctions” designed to drive the price of ammo up by BANNING imports.

_That’s the same State Department which NAGR caught red-handed restarting the funnel of your tax dollars into funding the UN “Small Arms Treaty_.”

Worse, since day one of the COVID-19 outbreak, our court system has said yes to almost any politician cooking up any unconstitutional idea so long as it’s under the guise of “public health.”

None of us want any more of that.

Still, now the Center for Disease Control (CDC) is pushing a new Euro-centric gun control framework that says _“Using a public health approach is essential to addressing firearm violence and keeping people safe and healthy.”_

_That’s why insisting that your U.S. Senators vote to DISPOSE of the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” is not enough_.

We must insist that the U.S. Senate help President Trump root out anti-gun policies pushed by Joe Biden’s government and ensure that NOT ONE TAXPAYER CENT is spent on implementing any part of this Treaty or what it stands for.

But I’m counting on your help to send that message -- before it’s all swept under the rug by the bureaucrats running for cover.

**[First, please sign your “END THE UN GUN BAN” Petition to both of your U.S. Senators at once](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=2kizc47bzflzd0nv9qimu327wd6985vskamuvig80vymheexoeetl4wo8ubofgk889xurzq2hstqdxvjm64xjsjcxqbpo8yv1dzuhpd16mn0jlugsgxnk3hqlt0qkaou5y4d092lk5om4pd8jqwpplzilnxor2ke0bg306ox5gzt3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szegr7&__onlt=h)**.

Once you have signed your petition, I am counting on your support to help the National Association for Gun Rights: 1) _Contact and mobilize_ up to 10 million pro-Second Amendment Americans using mail, email and phone banks to turn up maximum pressure on the U.S. Senate; 2) _Launch a full-scale online effort_ , including internet ads, op-eds, text messages, and video updates, working highly-trafficked blogs and using social media to generate even more heat to ensure the so-called “Small Arms Treaty” can be returned to the White House where President Trump can finish it off; and 3) _Craft hard-hitting radio_ , newspaper and TV ads, which we’ll be ready to unleash at a moment’s notice if we can raise the resources to fund them. Of course, a program of this scale won’t be cheap.

But as I explained, doing nothing would only play right into the gun grabbers’ hands.

**[So along with your signed petition, could you please consider a generous contribution of $100 TODAY](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=r17g3kg1ziwdltpq9qzl61ljgfwr7v1fyvt8rn002dnzhegimaimckny2439tg0g2m76l3y1ishy4qig99c8g7xjvjb5bh6seui62upcayw386jretn2pycqlnk3i35m201abul3x1ox0k3wuyixldub80yxmi38z1jrrdqkk56&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szegr7&__onlt=h)**?

I know that’s a lot to ask for, believe me.

But the fight to reclaim our stolen freedoms is here, Fellow Patriot. It’s on. There’s no time to wait.

So please act -- and agree to give generously.

**[But if $100 is just too much -- even given the urgency of the situation -- please agree to $30, or at least $15 TODAY](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=r17g3kg1ziwdltpq9qzl61ljgfwr7v1fyvt8rn002dnzhegimaimckny2439tg0g2m76l3y1ishy4qig99c8g7xjvjb5bh6seui62upcayw386jretn2pycqlnk3i35m201abul3x1ox0k3wuyixldub80yxmi38z1jrrdqkk56&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szegr7&__onlt=h)**.

_If you and I don’t fight back, they’ll be back again to keep stealing our freedoms one bite at a time_.

Whatever you can do, please act IMMEDIATELY. There’s no time to waste.

**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Association for Gun Rights **

P.S. As long as the UN “Small Arms Treaty” is pending in the Senate, ratification is all that’s needed for this gun grab to become reality. And that’s REGARDLESS of who occupies the White House or their position on the Treaty!

**[That’s why I’m counting on you to sign your “END THE UN GUN BAN” Petition at once](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=2kizc47bzflzd0nv9qimu327wd6985vskamuvig80vymheexoeetl4wo8ubofgk889xurzq2hstqdxvjm64xjsjcxqbpo8yv1dzuhpd16mn0jlugsgxnk3hqlt0qkaou5y4d092lk5om4pd8jqwpplzilnxor2ke0bg306ox5gzt3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szegr7&__onlt=h)!**

This petition insists your Senators vote to reject the UN “Small Arms Treaty” and send it back to the President where he can kill it.

**[So will you please sign your “END THE UN GUN BAN” Petition IMMEDIATELY and agree to your most generous contribution of $100, $30 or at least $15 TODAY](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=2kizc47bzflzd0nv9qimu327wd6985vskamuvig80vymheexoeetl4wo8ubofgk889xurzq2hstqdxvjm64xjsjcxqbpo8yv1dzuhpd16mn0jlugsgxnk3hqlt0qkaou5y4d092lk5om4pd8jqwpplzilnxor2ke0bg306ox5gzt3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szegr7&__onlt=h)**?
---

[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=sd6eodyitwfbg7ipxtng5kf88ebyt6nhzffqw3mfu03qqzjjnap1t6n55h9bfjsof1l5kxve3ipgzw7yahua7oke60z8mpqod1ri44qd4tchy9as5t1p7ba419v&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szegr7&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=16lzsdbs21o8gd52hbe8dtvsuos1xitbzntxrpx20k25guk77nnlnstsevojmizksc5vx88k2n76btor7m72zll5mcz7pp0s5p94ldi8u9b9t658y7tm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szegr7&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=3wb9cw7veffe2foqajan1r9fm75kx6phd46frhoebvvmrgbvrqpaomk7ck5bs8x6x8o76iijzxi0ytpgc6ivux1qxa3cznmbgeghieor3xlnghjr8hqna435zuml0qsj1jm9qg806dy99a&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szegr7&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=yf6alqxcw0mzvu8zl92p00b8thrjl26x32zcd9giwu8n5stzyx3z403mn23svjtnrpdtia8ibffzhrjeh00ilxl6hulgb6be92kkzwamagw05x3v94b6k8dxfv9ru5xiijs4rjclqammp3osgh4uugh9nlgkvdwfkf2qif05315q8xxkrqvl2173lkv8rt7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szegr7&__onlt=h) _The National Association for Gun Rights, Inc. is a non-profit tax exempt advocacy organization under Section 501(c)4 of the IRC. They can be contacted toll-free at 1-877-405-4570. Its web address is[www.NationalGunRights.org](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=3n5o9yeuh103nci68ad86urvgyw67g50tylzg4wbe2nc0ikbwohxxv521yvku4ckdm1c5jzwa70220c65i6ipswn30acoqn98rnpc4ungb0maw721a7vn9p73ol1u&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szegr7&__onlt=h)_ Not produced or emailed at taxpayer expense.

Once you have signed your petition, I am counting on your support to help the National Association for Gun Rights: 1) Contact and mobilize up to 10 million pro-Second Amendment Americans using mail, email and phone banks to turn up maximum pressure on the U.S. Senate; 2) Launch a full-scale online effort , including internet ads, op-eds, text messages, and video updates, working highly-trafficked blogs and using social media to generate even more heat to ensure the so-called “Small Arms Treaty” can be returned to the White House where President Trump can finish it off; and 3) Craft hard-hitting radio , newspaper and TV ads, which we’ll be ready to unleash at a moment’s notice if we can raise the resources to fund them. Of course, a program of this scale won’t be cheap. But as I explained, doing nothing would only play right into the gun grabbers’ hands. ? I know that’s a lot to ask for, believe me. But the fight to reclaim our stolen freedoms is here, Fellow Patriot. It’s on. There’s no time to wait. So please act -- and agree to give generously. . If you and I don’t fight back, they’ll be back again to keep stealing our freedoms one bite at a time. Whatever you can do, please act IMMEDIATELY. There’s no time to waste. For Freedom, Dudley Brown President National Association for Gun Rights P.S. As long as the UN “Small Arms Treaty” is pending in the Senate, ratification is all that’s needed for this gun grab to become reality. And that’s REGARDLESS of who occupies the White House or their position on the Treaty! ! This petition insists your Senators vote to reject the UN “Small Arms Treaty” and send it back to the President where he can kill it. ? subject: My situation is in your hands right now, Friend

body:
I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart.

| | | [](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcdf6bmumkid6qrl989nio33choqji2ncgb32mk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clh69pb4c3h2bs)
---
Our future rests in your hands, Friend. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9f6rs2lc4p7m0802a98a7su3qo7enfsgnabiko0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clh69pb4c3h2bs)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And Friend, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi0c62juf74ugo7efmcrfevc52bsteb8f34nog0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clh69pb4c3h2bs)**

---

---
[ DONATE $47 >>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zabmisc20i817q3sferb4dp0l2f16gjq7ulqo7eo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clh69pb4c3h2bs)

[ DONATE $33 >>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmee0tv3tgvk8lhu47ukf0r6pvvu90lq1b99pc00_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clh69pb4c3h2bs)

[ DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN SPARE >>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z82t93l0b52tenfhvvrnqugmr4gtnf4gjjb5u52o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clh69pb4c3h2bs)
---
If you cannot afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, all I ask is you _please keep me and my team in your prayers!_**I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!**Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears _Immigrant_ _Marine_ _First black female Lt. Governor of VA_

Immigrant.

Mom.

Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh1m0gl75nk2601o0h3482fpkem0srtj3gi28ado_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clh69pb4c3h2bs)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.

Eric Burlison here. As a member of the DOGE Subcommittee, I've flipped over **DOZENS** of Deep State logs and watched the Swamp critters crawl out.

And let me tell you, when it comes to Epstein, something smells **ROTTEN** :
**> > Bureaucrats covering for bureaucrats**

**> > Global Actors suppressing the truth

**
It's all being withheld from Congress on purpose. And the truth is, not many "Republicans" are willing to open up this can of worms if it means jeopardizing their careers.

[**_I work for the American people, and YOU deserve to know the truth._**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/yAA7u3IPaMm0hsk2caiLK68EZbGeejnlbxR9lxYt4GsOS2A_MApcilMHUFmnfuiIn1VpR5ygHA9I1-UmysDb-9H3c-fbs4_4llRlemksXGcFM3a1NlXcFFdzoHuBx-uHYZXy1SPXxC_1yNTWunZ0m-GWofjhW7vhlAY1TvV2EAJPv_69xNVzQLVhTq_SwGVcpTFsvO5NPM_Zzrzu9ImJsr7-W08rFIFm51f_RMvXM0zhV3PyQaHwEPf_Hyf7AbQOZ2cXZt3ICqxM5nSdjqpNsvVB2ljDaZHRIsAX4Trf6EeXInpoCTuB2kdHrWeLpydHt6eAUN-44m2pzZU7ztlbMDmzOytBlhLzIJLl1DclmJwrNgDU9A4Bf7cZ79mfbsa8kiTl1OHmBAUAJicVbPTRR2GD1YkIrupx5evOQIn_qIG0hDwaCkaO_iSrR3dE83h2TUiH7fVewOHjV9nzh3hj6Onz-_S8i6C-V2TS5SgWSWLdbmX2X9tqg7FPUi1pzyf_duHqXMAgZT69EPSusIk5pG5oBzRBrFPgRGYPHWNwWAWbmvpiHyGD8uuocDY8EWMTuXj5ZVmxjwmEH25CQv7gAa1xWOznH_nEeelCZrEB33QbX49W94Mt0aDXjseuDTfPFp30ldbPmsVbjYMV8LKOPCGfqSx65VIWAaWcS7pLjYM8IHhkGt1YVgOMY8gCFvXwqXzOvtPKEW1BVN5J5bD0ezfPcOXs6RmltptSfN76k1LeAKZGCRBlRgHatb_uUJP1MWWJ_zI/gewLjBO6Q7dcHzfLJLP9WxphNcFxNDL-/10)

**But why is AG Pam Bondi playing us for dummies?

**What happened to the "binders" of evidence they were touting on TV?

_**
**That 's why I'm going to find out, but I need YOUR help.

You see, this isn't performative popcorn politics. This isn't a debate over marginal tax rates or how much money we should give to foreign nations.

[**My investigation into Epstein CUTS DEEP into the global power structure, threatening every crooked politician who has****sold their soul to the Swamp****.**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/kXQZaPHNMlATpswH1OcFGlyySUMbbuPED2nOlL4R50NNEX-7-ox-Zl2-sgA23e1u_-uqaOG_U23qTkbqt3TChbZqdf7dFNhnxFwkm7K1zlOov4chTctLTSeICC0gPLJdnoz3-krRbdrtZAowc3JxBRIiBhoToWJYgxiDF85WnnoOz0glUMXgZtwR0xMjWNnY3yppPn7YZsSdzLk3vaghrC7ktARVRSzsW4bJ0ljjHZK-DmHA4Lnr-269aC2GoQKNqLVi4GWf_TMkQw0ZBY5neJoxOIZc6WZUkxXjiL9ooGD-OJ2WbRoiP2Tyyhug4FW7vHGfcHI15XqzL0sSZFUtnWESGHamzQH3h025etF9zYlF9oF5mWZ-YeABTQ_g0_FGYV0Y2SwS3YO-_K-er2Mk3MWnOHkAv4chNjMpydh93BEyCA2NKkACMbUD8sgSfo3AbbIEXxM5nFxkEM-eRjYsP_alHwM6Z_lcOs1pWfUnBPEI1p31mMwEXfeBZS3DHamVOmIwfLlJHCF2Z38KgUZIvDf3pn0dl9rP5LBOQNP9bawPoTseCEwhHR4xzOSJ4jUGNsfLx1sUCNf49z9BdOlTulSF5lEoCX-WebpLDIYwmyjE0NpDY0Hbj2srgP2JIRVk-JVoTLab-IltLMdxBLhiPVUavNcgcRNYkG4mE282y54kWpLexRc-oMxWK1w7vq1O-I9dY4RKmjlPfPCeW-2vCdNRynxYCjlWBwPw_OBNXZltwRp6ONJuWSWde-DfF3QtI9KpI80/I8kSMNwGQr_BwhxbNdqxpQJMf9FBRbXc/10)

subject: They knew exactly what they were doing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
I promise I won’t stop fighting. Friend, Republicans knew what they were doing. They knew this bill would leave tens of millions of Americans uninsured.
They knew it would slash food assistance for millions of families.
They knew it would shut down rural hospitals and nursing homes.
They knew it would cause health insurance premiums to skyrocket. **And they passed it anyway.** This is the biggest rollback of our health care system in modern history. And Republicans are doing it just to hand billions of dollars in tax breaks to the wealthiest people in the country. Our mid-month fundraising deadline is tomorrow, and I need your help to meet this moment. If we’re going to hold Republicans accountable and fight for the health care millions of Americans depend on, we need to show our strength right now. name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: We need to call out Governor Abbott
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0714_e [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0714_e]
Friend,
On Friday, I stood with local advocates and community leaders at a press conference to call out Governor Abbott’s blatant targeting of black and brown communities via redistricting during a special session.
The newly proposed maps were revealed just days ago and would drastically alter several districts, including the historic 18th Congressional District. These changes threaten to undermine fair representation, silence voters, and dilute the voices of communities of color across our region. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0714_e&refcode2=cb79144e-dd60-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c]
You can watch some of my remarks below from [https://youtu.be/dmcITXYg7I8] KPRC2 [https://youtu.be/dmcITXYg7I8] , KHOU , [https://youtu.be/KwmWxQCZsuk] & Fox 26. [https://youtu.be/bRDMRTyAmxE]
We must hold our elected officials accountable when they put politics over people. That’s why I’m asking for your support . [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0714_e&refcode2=cb79144e-dd60-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c]
Can you chip in today to help us fight back against gerrymandering and protect fair representation? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0714_e&refcode2=cb79144e-dd60-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c]
Thank you for continuing to stand with us in this critical moment.
Amanda K. Edwards

name: Team Powered by People
subject: To win, we can’t afford to wait.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
To win in 2026 or take back the White House in 2028, we need to start organizing _now_. We can’t afford to sit back and wait.
That’s why Beto is hitting the road again! This time we’re hosting town halls in critical states to answer questions, share a positive vision for the future, and organize against Trump’s extremism.
**We’re hosting town halls _this week_ in Baltimore, Richmond, and Philadelphia.**
[**Will you donate $3 right now to help us cover the cost of putting on these events? You will help with Beto’s travel costs and renting event space—every donation will make a difference.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250714-1.ArdEWy&refcode=ema20250714-240218&t=1&akid=240218%2E444211%2ED8Cn_w)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250714-1.ArdEWy&refcode=ema20250714-240218&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=240218%2E444211%2ED8Cn_w)**
To take on and defeat Trump’s cruelty and extremism and win political power, we must act. We won’t build a positive future just by hoping for it alone.
We're committed to doing everything we can to organize, answer questions from folks, and build long-term political power. We don’t check Party affiliation at the door of our town halls, all are welcome.
And Beto doesn't take a salary from Powered by People, like thousands of other folks, he’s a proud volunteer. But putting on town halls across Texas and now other states does take resources.
[**_Please help Beto hit the road again this week by chipping in $3 right now._**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250714-1.ArdEWy&refcode=ema20250714-240218&t=21&akid=240218%2E444211%2ED8Cn_w)
Thank you,
Team Powered by People

name: Derek Tran
subject: open and honest
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111462972/557341535/1527952032?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRmM2E2M2UtZGU2MC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kHVzhHY0XWAB4BZMJ60GkxXLhbcuo4nzmSoVBCI02lc=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111462973/557341536/1527952032?refcode=em-7.14.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRmM2E2M2UtZGU2MC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kHVzhHY0XWAB4BZMJ60GkxXLhbcuo4nzmSoVBCI02lc=)

Unlike many in Congress, I pride myself on being open and honest with you. I realize I’ve sent you a lot of messages lately, and you deserve to know why. **➡️ I’m in a unique position as a first-term Congressman in the minority party, and one of the very few Democrats who flipped a Republican-held seat in November.** I didn’t win by a landslide – only 653 votes separated me and my opponent. **➡️ Because of this, the national GOP has made me a top target.** Only three seats separate House control, and CA-45 could be the key piece for either party. Holding the Trump Administration accountable depends on it. **➡️ I’m not a career politician, I can’t afford to bankroll my own campaign, and I refuse to accept money from Big Pharma and Big Oil.** That makes meeting our critical fundraising goals difficult – and I depend on people like you chipping in a few bucks along the way. **[I know the midterm elections seem far off, but your continued support could make the difference in keeping CA-45 blue and flipping the House majority. Can I count on you to chip in $3 to start July with strength?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111462974/557341537/1527952032?refcode=em-7.14.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRmM2E2M2UtZGU2MC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kHVzhHY0XWAB4BZMJ60GkxXLhbcuo4nzmSoVBCI02lc=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111462975/557341538/1527952032?refcode=em-7.14.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRmM2E2M2UtZGU2MC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kHVzhHY0XWAB4BZMJ60GkxXLhbcuo4nzmSoVBCI02lc=)

name: Greater New Haven Green Party
subject: Chapter Meeting Weds July 16 - 8pm
body:
We've got municipal candidates, lets talk strategy | |
---
| | |
# We've Got Candidates for 2025!
---
| |
---
### JULY 16 GNGHP MEETING -Weds 8PM
_Please join by Zoom for this important meeting!_
[REGISTER FOR THIS MEETING HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=4a58fbc4d1&e=91a3f04de5)
### _AGENDA_
1\. Welcome and introductions
2\. Paul Garlinghouse for Alder 2025
3 . Justin Paglino for Selectman 2025
4\. Additional candidate recruitment
5\. Outreach plans
6 Past Events
7\. Upcoming Events
-[GPUS ANM 7/31 - 8/3 ](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=2d870c49ba&e=91a3f04de5)

[REGISTER FOR THIS MEETING HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=c0111f7492&e=91a3f04de5)
---
|
---
|
## Past Events
---
| Several CT Greens attended this Rally for Palestine at the Capital Building July 29th, which was covered by WTNH. See their (breif) coverage [here](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=78e1a78cff&e=91a3f04de5).
---
---
---
|
## **We are the Party of People, Planet, and Peace!**
---
|
#### The need for an independent left party is clear. We are an ecosocialist peace party who fight for social, economic, electoral, and environmental justice. Come to our meetings and events to meet us and get involved!
---
| _The Greater New Haven Green Party_ is a chapter
of the Green Party of Connecticut!
Find our chapter Bylaws [HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=2b638dbdd4&e=91a3f04de5).

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands right now, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart.

| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdibvcancrto9ipcg6kf3g8qf3h1iunubetkjqa8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj68pj6c1h2bs)
---
Our future rests in your hands, Friend. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7kii3n5bn02a5anfopfqkogejvpr2s5tb9tard0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj68pj6c1h2bs)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And Friend, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z17mruje6oujtgl5vq7vbrjb3lmdh5nitq9lmi68_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj68pj6c1h2bs)**
---
[ DONATE $850 >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9mc90v5g1rups2bhbk112b8d263psglc1tronjo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj68pj6c1h2bs)
---
[ DONATE $600 >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5l1k0s4m7euipnqgjmvqabl2udftui944tiasag_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj68pj6c1h2bs)
---
[ DONATE $350 >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zg6u3dcjc2l07tc6vsofc4qeccgcc93skoue7j9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj68pj6c1h2bs)
---
[ DONATE $120 >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zoid1dae7rv0j80c8e8hgsr6qh3rc6b50iek05k0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj68pj6c1h2bs)
---
[ DONATE $65 >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zf6jdclk5ltvsjntj1h0jcvoegb4le5l7acb0a5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj68pj6c1h2bs)
---
[ DONATE $47 >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp6624ql2980nkjci81c6iu7u6k7q83fms5ln558_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj68pj6c1h2bs)
---
[ DONATE $33 >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z85enlr58vquv6qv1r5qhpg04nfb4bc3u1lkanb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj68pj6c1h2bs)
---
[ DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN SPARE >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4o55vnjpk708ijbesikf74lr497pp1bjgm3mtr8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj68pj6c1h2bs)
---
If you cannot afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, all I ask is you _please keep me and my team in your prayers!_**I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!**Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears _Immigrant_ _Marine_ _First black female Lt. Governor of VA_
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z83ftlj91m2fe13lirgnd8895a92dahiplkka90g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj68pj6c1h2bs)
---

|
---
Immigrant.
Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ze658aknkdgek9bsdoemm67jgdn90vpb1kehlbqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj68pj6c1h2bs)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.

clean_body: I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. | | | Our future rests in your hands, Friend. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. This is a humble from the heart, so please read it all the way through.In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few SERIOUS challenges right now: While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond! Now Spanberger has a GIGANTIC fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And Friend, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. If you cannot afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, all I ask is you please keep me and my team in your prayers!I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 | | Pop Acta Media | National Republican Polling PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: NPR + PBS Protection Alert via Our Revolution
subject: 5 days to save NPR and PBS

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?t=1011&refcode=email-20250714_v&akid=9017%2E5885482%2E1iccqT ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

This is THE make or break week for Trump's all-out assault on our public
media.

The Senate has to vote by FRIDAY on Trump's so-called "rescissions
package," a cynical attempt to claw back vital funds already passed by
Congress in order to defund NPR and PBS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?source=email-20250714&t=1061&akid=9017%2E5885482%2E1iccqT ]Headline: Senate turns its attention to DOGE cuts — with the clock
ticking

If it does not pass by July 18, the funding request dies. And with key
Republican Senators expressing concern, our team is in an all out sprint
this week to OVERWHELM the Senate with public pressure.

Republicans can only lose 4 votes, and with your urgent help, Our
Revolution can ramp up lobbying efforts and deliver more than 70,000
powerful voices directly to key Senators who will decide the fate of PBS
and NPR.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250714nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9017%2E5885482%2E1iccqT ]To pull it off, we urgently need to raise the funds to get more organizers
on the ground to make our voices heard. Will you chip in right now to stop
Trump's destructive attack on our public media and save NPR and PBS?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

Senators from both sides of the aisle have heard the outcry from
communities nationwide, and several Republicans have already signaled
they'll oppose these cuts. But if we don't push harder right now, Trump
and his allies might win this dangerous game of chicken.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?source=email-20250714&t=1060&akid=9017%2E5885482%2E1iccqT ]Headline: Senate GOP plots how to move Trump's $9.4B clawbacks request

We're mobilizing in key states, flooding Senate offices with calls and
letters, and delivering the signatures of 70,000 grassroots supporters who
demand Congress defend public media. Your donation – right now – can help
us sustain this final dramatic sprint to the finish line, enabling
rapid-response lobbying and amplifying grassroots voices directly at
critical swing-vote Senators.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250714nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9017%2E5885482%2E1iccqT ]Together, we've beaten back Trump's reckless cuts before. Now, let's do it
again. Please chip in whatever you can today to tell Trump: hands off our
public media!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Here’s why I went to Tennessee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Republicans seem to have a knack for avoiding their constituents
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1710%2E791427%2ELQvWd8)

Friend, I host a town hall in my district every month because it gives me an opportunity to hear from my constituents and find out what they need.
Every single member of Congress should be doing the same — but Republicans seem to have a knack for avoiding their constituents.
One of those Republicans is Rep. Andy Ogles. You may remember him as the guy who said that Zohran Mamdani should have his citizenship revoked by the Department of Justice.
He also enthusiastically voted to kick millions of Americans, including thousands in his district, off Medicaid, food assistance, and other life-saving programs.
But now that his voters have serious questions for him about that vote, he’s nowhere to be found. **So, I decided to go down to his district in Tennessee over the weekend.**
I figured that if he’s not going to find the bravery to speak to his constituents, then I’ll do it for him, alongside local Democratic leaders who are fighting to hold Rep. Ogles accountable.
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&refcode=em250714-1-180&t=2&akid=1710%2E791427%2ELQvWd8)
As I looked around at the crowd, I felt that the future was bright.
Most of the 500+ people who joined our town hall told me they'd never been to one before — that they've never had a chance to talk with the people who claim to represent them.
And it is clear when you go out and talk with regular people anywhere around the country that they feel betrayed by this administration and its attacks on working people, immigrant communities, and our basic rights as Americans.
**Friend, we have to keep up the momentum we are seeing on the ground and continue to work to block Trump’s unpopular agenda.**
The best way you can assist me in doing more events like these and doing more to put Republicans on the spot is by making a contribution to my campaign today and powering our efforts.
**[Chip in today — $5, $10, any amount — to help me keep up the all-important fight to defend our democracy and spread the truth about Trump’s harmful administration. We have The People on our side, but only when we can deliver a message that speaks directly to their needs and raise resources to get that message out there.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&refcode=em250714-1-180&t=3&akid=1710%2E791427%2ELQvWd8)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_

In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

## **On Episode 179 of The Qasim Rashid Show:**
* I interview international human rights lawyer Diana Buttu
* We discuss the genocide in Gaza committed by the Israeli government, funded by Western powers, and urged on by complicit Corporate Democrats
* Diana shares her vision for a future committed to justice for all people, Muslim, Christian, and Jewish, and how we can all work together to make that a reality

Take your support a step further with a monthly, recurring donation today. | | | United We Dream, and everything we do, is powered by people like you, Peter. Your support is a catalyst for change for hundreds of working people — especially young people — who are ready to meet this moment and organize their communities into action. From trainings on developing local campaigns to workshops on mobilizing large groups, you’ve steadily supported our campaign to equip young people with the tools to be effective organizers. **[Now, we’re hoping you’ll take that transformative support a step further with a monthly, recurring donation today. name: VoteVets.org
subject: 🪖 An important message for ALL VoteVets supporters... 🇺🇸🫡
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Peter - please, don’t click away before reading.
#
Peter - please, don’t click away before reading.
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Peter.

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful and impactful ads out there. It has helped us continue to be one of the most impactful and effective organizations in politics, even with all that Trump throws our way.
Your support helps us win races that otherwise wouldn’t even be competitive.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It has stopped more efforts to privatize the VA than we can count. It won things like the PACT Act, ensuring Veterans suffering from toxic exposures could get the treatment they need and deserve.
And now, it’s a huge part of how we are fighting back against Trump and Doug Collins as they work to dismantle the VA, piece by piece.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation online to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. But with Trump coming for everything we hold dear, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and fighting back against these liars and hypocrites, and defending our Constitution at a moment when it is in extreme peril.
[**If helping VoteVets lead this fight from the front seems worth an $5 donation to you, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation today. We really need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-july25.sScHXv&refcode=em250714-1-120&t=1&akid=34477%2E3013755%2EJhUi8E)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-pac-em-july25.maZ8-4&refcode=em250714-1-120&t=20&akid=34477%2E3013755%2EJhUi8E)**
---
****
| **[Rush $25 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2935?c0=vv-pac-em-july25.wJJ4cw&refcode=em250714-1-120&t=21&akid=34477%2E3013755%2EJhUi8E)**

name: NRSC HQ
subject: Democrats are trying to pull a fast one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
don’t let them catch us off guard

Friend, Democrats are trying to pull a fast one in Nebraska.

Dan Osborn, a fake "Independent" just announced he's running for Senate against NRSC Vice Chair Pete Ricketts.

This guy calls himself an independent, but he's fully backed by Chuck Schumer and the Democrat machine. If he's in the Senate, he'll do everything he can to cripple President Trump's agenda.

**[Will you help Pete fight back and win ASAP?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvruqb7jqikial4nqhrmj052437llvef6gvko4p8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj64oj4cth2bs)**
[DONATE NOW >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfndmt6nb4ccr99rklscmft5c3d8u62gaqcfkoao_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj64oj4cth2bs)
**[Democrats tried to run this playbook last year, and they got really close.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhpn043sh76sng457shi6lpfu4h4u573n5792sm0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj64oj4cth2bs)** _It was the closest Senate race in Nebraska in more than 50 years._

They almost caught us asleep at the wheel then. They're hoping they'll catch us napping now.

**[We can't let it happen. >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm71074n36sluq0iv3b5dpl3ks8kia8t9m5rop9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2clj64oj4cth2bs)**

If you care about keeping President Trump's majority, this is your chance to slam the door on a Democrat scheme to end it.

Thanks in advance,

-NRSC HQ

name: Weil 4 Sen
subject: 📣 SPOTTED: your next Senator, deep in Broward.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
No, this isn’t a campaign stock photo. And no, we didn’t stage a backdrop, Friend.
This is just me standing shoulder to shoulder with Floridians who believe we still have the power to change things. Not Pictured? Your vital support!!
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4432474541397455735344534631795044536C6C6D422B62392F49735064716E7462566F647675326E5456446F626544524444643665584A7733576C2B556A69/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-14%20at%202.16.50%E2%80%AFPM.png]
We snapped this picture at the Broward Democratic Party office, and what you’re seeing is the truth behind every headline, every email, and every dollar we raise:
This campaign isn’t about me. It’s about all of us.
We’re building something big from the bottom up. That means union halls, living rooms, community centers, and yes, tiny packed offices with enough heart to flip a U.S. Senate seat. We are fighting to lay the groundwork not just for 2026, but for years to come to fight off the horrible policy we are seeing implemented today.
If you’re with us, I have one ask : chip in what you can today to help us keep showing up where we are needed most?
Donate HERE. Every dollar gets us moving and fighting [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]

Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
Because the people in this photo? They’re not waiting on permission to make history. And neither am I.
Gratefully,
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.05.04%E2%80%AFAM.png]

name: Katie Porter
subject: My bill to protect Americans from natural disasters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39895%2E3422442%2EJezvDs)
Dear Peter,
I often joke that if Congress had a motto, it would be “solving yesterday’s problems tomorrow... maybe.” Too often, people in power are slow to recognize our biggest challenges—and even slower to act.
When I was in Congress, I spearheaded legislation to create a non-partisan National Disaster Safety Board, which would conduct comprehensive investigations after natural disasters to help us better prepare for the future. I worked with experts to craft this bill to better protect Americans. I was able to get it passed through the House, but unfortunately, it died in the Senate.
Now, in the aftermath of the immense tragedy in Texas and other historic storms nationwide, my legislation is in the news again.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250714_1_ak?refcode=em20250714-39895&refcode2=39895_3422442_JezvDs&akid=39895%2E3422442%2EJezvDs)
**I’m glad Trump nominees and Republican legislators are now embracing this idea. What matters most is saving lives and preventing future tragedies, and I hope this bill can finally become law.**
Disaster preparedness and response should not be partisan issues. We deserve leaders who act with empathy and urgency to keep Americans safe. **As Governor, this is exactly the type of leadership I’ll bring to our state.**
—Katie
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250714_1_ak?refcode=em20250714-39895&refcode2=39895_3422442_JezvDs&akid=39895%2E3422442%2EJezvDs)

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250714-39895&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39895_3422442_JezvDs&akid=39895%2E3422442%2EJezvDs)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39895&t=4&akid=39895%2E3422442%2EJezvDs)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=39895)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39895&t=5&akid=39895%2E3422442%2EJezvDs)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94caea39-cc63-43e3-9af1-3f332b5716ee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: URGENT: Wealthy Republican businessman files candidacy for PA-06
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Will you help me keep this seat and flip the House blue?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111465153/557349399/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDAwY2FjNy1lNDYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQDM0e-FPmUlE2fcGjMFGCNecXfecZV0kSOCD78wvhk=&emci=e72d1db1-be60-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b000cac7-e460-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=21278485)
---
I needed to share this update with you directly, Derek:**A wealthy Republican businessman just filed paperwork to run against me. **
With the GOP in control of the White House, the Senate, and the House, it's absolutely critical for Democrats to hold on to every seat possible – _including mine in PA-06_ – to more effectively push back against the reckless and dangerous actions of this administration.

**We can't wait until next year to take action, Derek. Building a strong grassroots movement must start now so we're prepared as we head into another election year in 2026. That's why I'm personally asking:**

**[Will you chip in $5, $25, or more right now so we can keep this seat and flip the House blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111465154/557349400/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1151-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDAwY2FjNy1lNDYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQDM0e-FPmUlE2fcGjMFGCNecXfecZV0kSOCD78wvhk=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111465155/557349401/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1151-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDAwY2FjNy1lNDYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQDM0e-FPmUlE2fcGjMFGCNecXfecZV0kSOCD78wvhk=)
---
Since day one, my priority has always been to use my voice and vote to help our community. This is just some of my recent work in Congress:
* I just started the BIOTech Caucus, building on the release of the National Security Commission on Emerging Biotechnology’s recent report to Congress, to raise awareness of the strength of other countries (like China) and to promote solutions that foster domestic innovation and improve our national security. More on that in an upcoming newsletter.

* As co-chair of the Climate Solutions Caucus, I fought against elimination of the EV and other clean energy tax credits in the Republican budget bill and am working on the upcoming Farm Bill to support local farmers while promoting conservation.

* I continue to push paid family leave policies at the federal level, most recently introducing the More Paid Leave for More Americans Act to take advantage of the patchwork of successful state-level programs across the country.

* I wrote the Public Service Loan Forgiveness Payment Completion Fairness Act to make it easier for people in public service careers to have their student loans forgiven.

**Every day, I'm working hard to build relationships with colleagues to deliver on issues that matter most to you and your family, from making health care more affordable and accessible to enabling economic growth._But I can't continue this work without your critical grassroots support, Derek. _**
**[Will you chip in right away so we can keep this seat in 2026, flip the House blue, and defend our communities against Trump and the GOP's extremist agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111465156/557349402/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1151-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDAwY2FjNy1lNDYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQDM0e-FPmUlE2fcGjMFGCNecXfecZV0kSOCD78wvhk=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111465157/557349403/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1151-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDAwY2FjNy1lNDYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQDM0e-FPmUlE2fcGjMFGCNecXfecZV0kSOCD78wvhk=)
---
There's work to be done,

Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

name: Jay Jones HQ
subject: A quick favor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?]
Hey there, it’s Jay Jones HQ — the team dedicated to electing Democrat Jay Jones as Virginia’s next Attorney General!
We’ll get right to the point: Our first mid-month deadline of the General Election is tomorrow night — and it’s crucial we have a strong showing.
Our current AG, Jason Miyares, is failing to represent Virginians’ best interests. He’s a Trump loyalist who has let MAGA policies threaten Virginians’ jobs, economic security, and hard-earned benefits.
And if that wasn’t enough, he is the only MAGA Republican up for reelection in 2025!
Unlike Miyares, Jay has spent his career fighting for our rights and freedoms — and he’ll keep that fight going as Attorney General.
The Commonwealth needs a leader like Jay who will defend it against Trump’s onslaught of attacks. But outside groups are already spending BIG to help Miyares buy this election, friend, so we need to ensure that Jay has the resources he’ll need to fight back against Miyares’ MAGA money!
Can you please chip in $10 or more today to help us hit our mid-month fundraising goal and help us defeat Jason Miyares in November? Every dollar makes a big difference! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=10]

Thank you for joining us in supporting Jay!
– Jay Jones HQ

1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Working families deserve fighters in their corner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dignity of Work PAC
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111465690/557351396/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk40-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2I1YTM3OC1lNTYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jn76Vhu8Y_rFb6Tmz9KdnbY3Zj_WDS_HrpDj4wiXLbw=)
Hi friend, Sherrod here. I always say that **when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.** To me, it’s common sense.
It’s not _“when you love this country,__you fight to give tax breaks to your corporate donors that price gouge and exploit workers.”_ That's not public service, that's blatant corruption.
I started the Dignity of Work PAC to elect pro-labor leaders who will stand with working families – and fight back against the corporate interests who don’t give a damn about the middle class.
**But the truth is that this fight takes consistent action from all of us. Which is why I’m personally reaching out today to ask for your help, friend:[Will you support the Dignity of Work PAC by becoming a monthly donor today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111465691/557351397/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk40-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2I1YTM3OC1lNTYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jn76Vhu8Y_rFb6Tmz9KdnbY3Zj_WDS_HrpDj4wiXLbw=)**[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111465692/557351398/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk40-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2I1YTM3OC1lNTYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jn76Vhu8Y_rFb6Tmz9KdnbY3Zj_WDS_HrpDj4wiXLbw=)
I’m always grateful for any amount folks give to help power our movement. But when grassroots supporters chip in a little each month, it gives us the ability to plan ahead, respond fast and stay in this fight.
I’ve seen it firsthand: Over the years, I’ve watched Republican billionaires and corporate interests spend millions to attack pro-worker candidates, including me.
But you know what scares these MAGA megadonors more than anything, friend? A steady drumbeat of regular folks – teachers, nurses, truck drivers, laborers – who commit to building a country where workers have a voice.
Month after month, recurring gifts can give us real momentum. It can help us elevate pro-worker candidates in tough races, help us hold politicians accountable when they try to gut Medicaid or SNAP to give more taxpayer money to corporations, and it gives us the power to keep organizing for critical elections across the country.
**Friend, will you join us and help create an economy – and a society – where work is valued?**[**Becoming a monthly donor is the most impactful way to support the Dignity of Work PAC. That’s why I set a critical goal of 350 new recurring donors by the 15th. Will you be one of them?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111465693/557351399/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk40-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2I1YTM3OC1lNTYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jn76Vhu8Y_rFb6Tmz9KdnbY3Zj_WDS_HrpDj4wiXLbw=)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5 Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111465694/557351400/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk40-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2I1YTM3OC1lNTYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jn76Vhu8Y_rFb6Tmz9KdnbY3Zj_WDS_HrpDj4wiXLbw=)

name: Ohio Dems
subject: Don’t let far-right extremism define Ohio’s future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111466004/557352552/-1426157924?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_250714_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODQ1N2Y3YS1lNjYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SkHd5YTONc8F0pI5zG0SEIVfJZ-QYpkCKpAWfmV5FLU=) Team,

As July marches on, Ohio Republicans continue to double down on their extremist agenda:

Whether it’s statehouse Republicans gutting public schools, working to criminalize abortion, or Ohio’s GOP Senators in Congress rubber stamping Trump’s agenda that rips away healthcare from hundreds of thousands of Ohioans and sides with billionaires and corporate donors while working Ohioans get left behind, it’s clear the GOP is not letting up any time soon.

[**_If we want to put a check on their dangerous agenda, we need to elect Ohio Democrats up and down the ballot next year. So we’re asking: will you chip in $5, $10, or anything you can to help us reach our $15,000 mid-month fundraising goal?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111466005/557352554/-1426157924?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_250714_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODQ1N2Y3YS1lNjYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SkHd5YTONc8F0pI5zG0SEIVfJZ-QYpkCKpAWfmV5FLU=)

Deep-pocketed billionaires and Republican special interests are _already_ flooding Ohio with special interest money.

**If they succeed, that’s two more years of Ohio Republicans following Trump’s every move – prioritizing corruption, greed, and their billionaire donors over Ohio’s working families.**

Meeting our fundraising benchmarks month-to-month is our key to success at the ballot box next year. If we don’t raise the money we need to fight back in every district, every race, and in every county, the GOP’s far-right extremism will define our state’s future.

[**_So please, if you can, will you donate before our crucial mid-month deadline?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111466006/557352555/-1426157924?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_250714_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODQ1N2Y3YS1lNjYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SkHd5YTONc8F0pI5zG0SEIVfJZ-QYpkCKpAWfmV5FLU=)

Thank you,

Ohio Dems **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111466007/557352556/-1426157924?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_250714_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODQ1N2Y3YS1lNjYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SkHd5YTONc8F0pI5zG0SEIVfJZ-QYpkCKpAWfmV5FLU=)**

name: Team Deb
subject: Pitch in and you might get a call from Deb!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
She’s traveling New Mexico and calling supporters between stops.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3226%2E400544%2EBOCoIo)
Deb is hitting the road for her **Lift Up New Mexico Tour** , spending her time speaking directly with voters across the state.
While she’s focused on meeting with New Mexicans in person, she has less time to raise the resources we need to win. But we still have important goals to meet this month to keep our campaign strong.
That’s why Deb is doing something special. **Between tour stops, she’ll be calling supporters who chip in while she’s on the road.**
Every dollar you give helps cover gas, food, supplies, and the resources we need to reach more voters face-to-face. Deb is doing the hard work — let’s make sure she has everything she needs.
**[Will you pitch in today to help us reach our mid-month goal and keep the Lift Up New Mexico Tour rolling?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250714_1_call?refcode=em20250714-3226&refcode2=3226_400544_BOCoIo&akid=3226%2E400544%2EBOCoIo)**

subject: Re-introducing myself

If my name and face are familiar, it's not just because I ran for Congress in 2024.
For more than 30 years, I was a TV news anchor, uplifting the stories of Central Pennsylvanians. I flew over New York City with the Pennsylvania National Guard after 9/11, delivered the heartbreaking news that _Roe v. Wade_ had been overturned on live television, and shared the stories of businesses closing, job losses, and families struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads.
**I am a dedicated truth teller with decades of experience standing up for our neighbors.**
Now I am working to replace former Freedom Caucus Chair and **_MAGA insurrectionist Scott Perry._**
* ❌ He has praised the GOP budget bill that just passed. You know — the one that will kick millions of hard-working Americans off Medicaid, shutter rural hospitals, and give tax cuts to the wealthy 1%.
* ❌ He has supported a national abortion ban with no exceptions.
* ❌ He helped plan the January 6th insurrection, where Americans lost their lives.

Scott Perry is too extreme for PA-10, and we deserve better.
Peter: PA-10 is a make-or-break district to flip the U.S. House. We have a serious shot at winning this district, but my opponent is backed by mountains of dark money and billionaire donors. The support of grassroots donors like you is crucial to our success.
[Now is when it counts, Peter. It is important that I raise as much money as possible in these first 24 hours to show Scott Perry and MAGA Republicans that Pennsylvanians want him OUT. Will you stand with me at this critical juncture by splitting a donation between myself and the Democratic Party of Georgia right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111466545/557354924/-611022034?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_071425_Stelsonsplit_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDM2MTBmYy1lODYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kgYfSnbjGvKy4yXg8rfDKe911KIsfbzQc6u3BC-zwOM=)

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Have you answered your call to duty?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
This isn’t about politics. It’s about the survival of common sense. |

---
Fellow Conservative,

I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan, and proud son of two working-class parents. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve the country I love. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate—but looking at what’s happening in our state and nation, I know I have to.

Minnesota is being led by two extreme voices: _**Governor Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—my opponent—who is somehow even more radical than her boss.**_ While our cities burned in 2020, she led the charge against law enforcement while Walz hesitated. That’s not leadership. That’s chaos.

Meanwhile, crime has increased, small businesses have struggled, and our schools fail to teach the basics. The Minnesota I grew up in—where I learned to skate, hunt, and respect my neighbors—feels like it’s slipping away.

I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday—October 2001— _**just weeks after 9/11.**_

_**I didn’t wait. I went.**_

And for the next 20+ years, I continued to serve. Not behind a desk or on cable news, but in the field—on missions that mattered, often in places you’ll never see on a map.

I don’t come from wealth or political pedigree. I come from hard work, long winters, and a deep desire to serve something bigger than myself. I earned degrees from Harvard, Johns Hopkins, and my MBA—not because I wanted to impress anyone, but because I wanted to serve better and lead smarter.

Now, I’m taking that same spirit to this campaign.
_**

[**HELP ME PROTECT THE AMERICA WE LOVE
CHIP IN $10 TODAY**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fe9534c359964201befd8ee48318706c&_e=VCMyGUFZ9vkvp9iaYj0xfYsmd5SrAH5L5_Em_Jnd1nuXeQpww476omYLwj-thOaC8xIOSIfoN1AZUwnhXd5eSbwApDaLi4HD5dlDhl1Izk4fdV_WTh1s7o59xMMIH23GB1Xl9fA_mUEQUS7WzSmgnnUEDyHnfqu9kA188jEA_dYocM7eL-zK2Ku8y0FR5hu9jt_IbGxWt8KenweLtfED9xhrFTu5A7PLNSNLZgVm7Y69KIjZB8oYsQWATIC95zg3WS5XnetCVtnMzJ6bJ7R8MvsZXuc0ttTvZsx3NtHz_hET3jRUmZ-RjxZX8gwFiD9i0EfrNxfNLDUpbjQBBDPuy4UwOZHk59sfnnybWWrBC5bjLFBoezjA7e0ElFTA8_KNsNEf3IHxG7r1tU9KCAWjR80nGy2CTezT8Klc1h-lQWp2dewmYQOahiqk3LNstTvCFSbLscVi7XK2yPFXpZHAuJXjODcreHnzMkZubocPHHoadw0-kL2ngZlQrbwhCgRENWnVH74ERdExcXoCqz_o-WlqdZfCmzDv-iUS0oGTk3z3THpO5maTGcT-3n7on6qwr6j4wi2K0dadGPYvHUM2HkG8e9RQ32U07NSsr4QXbMA1fZHjjDSJZgGs4J6zYqnQl43gi78vnNWkipAXb58Z9s5wrzYN1wG5Ggngur9r1WL9MQIuZusW52oQglicyNN7A5qtJ7hlR-fCp6btrN0q3-Ke1yADXKUlCBcYTjgxQYBsVHKwZON_z0-cRPNwkJz6FOBudvBBraxJE7KEj1EFtdL0sEXDoqV5macPIT3wpm4%3D)

_
