This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential race since 1976, and, unfortunately, hasn’t had Republican representation in the Senate since 2009. **But I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for.**

And truthfully, I’m not running because I dreamed of holding office. I’m running because every time I came home from deployment, things seemed worse—more divided, less free, and further removed from the Minnesota and America I was willing to risk my life for.

We need a new kind of leadership rooted in service, not self-interest.

**If you believe in what I’m fighting for,[even $5 goes a long way.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fe9534c359964201befd8ee48318706c&_e=VCMyGUFZ9vkvp9iaYj0xfYsmd5SrAH5L5_Em_Jnd1nuXeQpww476omYLwj-thOaC8xIOSIfoN1AZUwnhXd5eSbwApDaLi4HD5dlDhl1Izk4fdV_WTh1s7o59xMMIH23GB1Xl9fA_mUEQUS7WzSmgnnUEDyHnfqu9kA188jEA_dYocM7eL-zK2Ku8y0FR5hu9jt_IbGxWt8KenweLtfED9xhrFTu5A7PLNSNLZgVm7Y69KIjZB8oYsQWATIC95zg3WS5XnetCVtnMzJ6bJ7R8MvsZXuc0ttTvZsx3NtHz_hFsnnKlq5jgmUvHaW5GsE75no2rTa4gCpBE--rPYWnCKcPsXaKbJRFft0JcQQAtYOCFEkJ4k5oQCmge7WQ4GQkkr_FBxnxydtXPKmlY0QZ5wALBgBC8jBtKIie2A8cn61SXKgOK9CL4prKZTdjaunueyM6CPLLhd-iQOtqaQcxFNIzXorZnT7OifzLX_r5pVSmaxx_LRgnCJelFeByIze79x-JBCQ--vk5YDHvOTm2KFE12tV0XG9QT5Skm3QAp9jZvEi_wxX65vz0KH-Ab3kCGvIIxwseLrxnZdOAOdtREShxEIE7OSO4J3WOTDSS7JuVrVu7ZEfS0mOsDy-E1faD212qHpnBridSl_ML_aqCaFhdIuaGbh9wesbDdpnoxa0BmH5n-m2R_6xWe_RBmJdyb2gZkcQmG6Qr8m08xSuhMY4fjkB7MlYvZ85_RncVnKu0K7TecFCaJCRbHAL8LQTw492nEiArfnzpMxJQgEGfEs_iGAy1Tn4VsvlzWmc87A9o%3D)**

If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. I just want to earn your trust in the weeks and months ahead. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, please chip in now.

Let’s take this fight to the Senate. And let’s do it together.

**You’ve done your part for this country.[Let me do mine—will you donate $15 to help?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fe9534c359964201befd8ee48318706c&_e=VCMyGUFZ9vkvp9iaYj0xfYsmd5SrAH5L5_Em_Jnd1nuXeQpww476omYLwj-thOaC8xIOSIfoN1AZUwnhXd5eSbwApDaLi4HD5dlDhl1Izk4fdV_WTh1s7o59xMMIH23GB1Xl9fA_mUEQUS7WzSmgnnUEDyHnfqu9kA188jEA_dYocM7eL-zK2Ku8y0FR5hu9jt_IbGxWt8KenweLtfED9xhrFTu5A7PLNSNLZgVm7Y69KIjZB8oYsQWATIC95zg3WS5XnetCVtnMzJ6bJ7R8MvsZXuc0ttTvZsx3NtHz_hGTz5Hz7-EInqt_WxxALJFjXI-8ap7BkOO5mioRTHNk939g7q-66t2c2Rw-eTfeby9zV88uWnM-08ZiqXdraL9aJr_10UUytkYCkMJYlgw2X0sfTSNqUmXb8Mwxs-OMW11hFnPPje_idvT8iPqNZK9b-8QAPojix27MYy5Jp2R81KDu1DPkyT-CuJjW0E8qXA9Gc3E0hu4XSbpNrIl8xbjIPsXOkOf2mWkIrdHQIfLCtTwkifCmjWk0VzUJ8N-XVrVy_xH2WE3ObuHU0YLP7_erd2Dclt4EbKKDeUNJNKxv4VLnnsRj0U5zyaYankOhZ0BAh-DSDEvxbCGM6F2dbMvuGJ6UlAw9wTcZ4uSdEgEAWDCLZJKNULEnbLy8NKBf6BK6jG8N25v0zIRlNp5PbDsFusFjmBpueAnsikJ1ros49lrcQXUQao1F3TzXAmBu_PHKzIw0JL4YaAfWKsOXtyT1K48MIhCDfgd6W1sOm3SaTQZKXa2BR6xQahmhr9mwYto%3D)**

It’s about the survival of common sense. | Fellow Conservative, I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan, and proud son of two working-class parents. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve the country I love. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate—but looking at what’s happening in our state and nation, I know I have to. Minnesota is being led by two extreme voices: Governor Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—my opponent—who is somehow even more radical than her boss. While our cities burned in 2020, she led the charge against law enforcement while Walz hesitated. That’s not leadership. That’s chaos. Meanwhile, crime has increased, small businesses have struggled, and our schools fail to teach the basics. The Minnesota I grew up in—where I learned to skate, hunt, and respect my neighbors—feels like it’s slipping away. I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday—October 2001— just weeks after 9/11. I didn’t wait. I went. And for the next 20+ years, I continued to serve. Not behind a desk or on cable news, but in the field—on missions that mattered, often in places you’ll never see on a map. I don’t come from wealth or political pedigree. I come from hard work, long winters, and a deep desire to serve something bigger than myself. I earned degrees from Harvard, Johns Hopkins, and my MBA—not because I wanted to impress anyone, but because I wanted to serve better and lead smarter. Now, I’m taking that same spirit to this campaign. Every dollar helps build a campaign ready to fight and win. This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential race since 1976, and, unfortunately, hasn’t had Republican representation in the Senate since 2009. But I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for. And truthfully, I’m not running because I dreamed of holding office. I’m running because every time I came home from deployment, things seemed worse—more divided, less free, and further removed from the Minnesota and America I was willing to risk my life for. We need a new kind of leadership rooted in service, not self-interest. If you believe in what I’m fighting for, If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. I just want to earn your trust in the weeks and months ahead. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, please chip in now. Let’s take this fight to the Senate. And let’s do it together. You’ve done your part for this country. In liberty Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Hey,

Tomorrow’s our mid-month fundraising deadline, and, honestly, we’re seeing a slowdown in online fundraising.

Summer is notoriously tough for grassroots campaigns. People are unplugged and distracted, and donations drop off. But the work doesn’t stop, and neither does Jason.

body:
Special Guest to visit PA-08 Wednesday 👀

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/46922e08864a/robs-nepa-rundown?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | | |
---
| Good Afternoon,
This week, Rob was home in the district, meeting face-to-face with hardworking Pennsylvanians, local leaders, and families to share how the One Big Beautiful Bill is delivering real results. Rob proudly voted for this landmark legislation to preserve the Trump Tax Cuts, protect our seniors, and secure a ban on federal taxes for tips and overtime pay. As always, he remains focused on putting the people of Northeastern Pennsylvania first and making sure Washington works for you.
Let’s dive into this week’s Rundown ⬇️
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | This week, Rob was not in Washington, but in the District. However, we’d like to focus on one major aspect of his “yes” vote on the Big Beautiful Bill: No Tax on Tips. We have many hardworking constituents in the service industry across PA-08 this will help daily. Rob is proud to stand up for our service industry in Washington and deliver wins for working-class people around our beautiful district.
---
|
---
[|
---](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=abd42988b4&e=131e83a3c2)
| Vice President J.D. Vance will be visiting PA-08 this week! He will be coming to Don’s Machine Shop, in West Pittston, on Wednesday to tour the facility and deliver remarks. If you are interested in attending, click [**here**](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=59c25bd14a&e=131e83a3c2).

|
---
[|
---](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=0150c0277a&e=131e83a3c2)
| Our Small Business of the Week is Arcaro & Genell in Old Forge. Be sure to support local businesses!
---
|
---
| The midterms are creeping up on us and are more critical than even 2024. That’s why the far-left is attacking Rob with lies and smears. He’s fighting for NEPA values, the American economy, and the truth.
**Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026!**

name: Jared, Marie, Lou, Vicente, Adam
subject: Two things…

Here’s what we need to do.

name: Team Downing
subject: Do you support the National Farm Security Action Plan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We’re protecting our nation’s most treasured industry.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-GvIATw)Peter,
_American farms are under attack. __
__The Biden Administration failed to act. __
__But President Trump and his team are fighting back._
Under Secretary Brooke Rollins’ bold leadership, the **_National Farm Security Action Plan_** is restoring strength to our food systems, defending American farmland from foreign adversaries, and declaring once and for all.
**_Farm security is national security._**
China and other hostile nations are trying to buy up U.S. farmland, infiltrate our research labs, and exploit our food supply. Enough is enough.
**This plan puts America First by:**
✅ _Blocking foreign land ownership_ ✅ _Defending our food supply from bio-threats_ ✅ _Cracking down on fraud in nutrition programs_ ✅ _Protecting American agricultural innovation_
The radical Left won’t like it, but patriotic Americans know the truth: if we can’t feed ourselves, we can’t defend ourselves.
__Stand with President Trump. Stand with our farmers. Stand for America.__
[ Sign now to support the National Farm Security Action Plan:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._mrtTBZhF3kpn63UDvfw)[ADD YOUR NAME IN SUPPORT
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Thank you,
Team Downing| |

Fellow Conservative,

_**The warning bells are ringing loud and clear:**_ Jon Ossoff just announced he raised more than $10 million in the last three months and he’s got $15.5 million in the bank to defeat me and push his liberal agenda.

_**98% of Ossoff’s donations came from small-dollar donors,**_ meaning that liberals across the country are invested in keeping Georgia blue and crippling President Trump’s agenda.

[**DONATE TO
FIGHT BACK **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f75cad4243674ef2bc620df85ef2fb0a&_e=sz2VD-cTeAqtr6SL6D-lLHtho-DSh4O8x-ACD7Uy1zXFifxHua8SX3t4HRk6VdBG8PviIbwMqoj1dhVbyes0LvhapSxsSx69RJ8eIuRb-s3EIzW-jVcaDFMpn-c-8Q1HSD_v_Eilz-slYuoyz5q1ZtZhTNNzJ3hf-9ZTDUkzAKX3vrHGPEZzSqDenPqSgAqLwVk9i-2hTA0V3Ngf36s2jHThZKNWZG5x9ugEl07ewaX3nmH85ocfNRus9gdovwvHyF5Pq3P-KimRb9-lAwvXEIckCP9rp9BIqUo9WsJvRqBt13f74WPO4121He9Ze4NpSSF1pY7Dj2QD_37m7g7ptUsIFmWi6NDefhx1hb4h8UF8dnz5o4nCra-TbE6esh2mK5tm5ZOAn8eJzrNqf6bCV-CKdLcEba9aoRK9ed8EAet5Xa8SVfWN7bZ7y1NU29_wmv-0cwGi5n9uti4aNAb-4AG5uMwd_5f6NATivSzoG7H_gmf_4BBuPXLzpBfVjwzjKyjWgz8Yg36fPTJpv3KKzTNwCCdCB4e_xn5oGt2Wj1--rPs0cbAbjb_0KYiChY5p11oSmFseCmlwSYJFG4SU3QCtyfu25eZTrSaL1IDp5Bjwel_bBFfLid1ZysHXedZbtmf-X1--izzee2s9RVBOVdFMpcfjcHpQQ9boi7mwlWi6ogA-nAsxvcJ2bC1yeRB-zTI6rM0eXtnzlPLNoNb7VLu-al2P3QASnW_HjXSyr8o%3D)
As I’ve said before, a tough campaign doesn’t scare me but six more years of Jon Ossoff does. He opposed one border security bill after another, voted against supporting Israel, and voted for letting men play women’s sports. He even wants to impeach President Trump.

I’m tied with Ossoff in the polls, _**but if we can’t keep pace**_ , our message will be drowned out and we’ll fall behind.

_**We need a surge of small-dollar donations to keep our ads running, hire staff, travel the state, and win this campaign.**_

clean_body: The warning bells are ringing loud and clear: Jon Ossoff just announced he raised more than $10 million in the last three months and he’s got $15.5 million in the bank | Fellow Conservative, The warning bells are ringing loud and clear: Jon Ossoff just announced he raised more than $10 million in the last three months and he’s got $15.5 million in the bank to defeat me and push his liberal agenda. 98% of Ossoff’s donations came from small-dollar donors, meaning that liberals across the country are invested in keeping Georgia blue and crippling President Trump’s agenda. As I’ve said before, a tough campaign doesn’t scare me but six more years of Jon Ossoff does. He opposed one border security bill after another, voted against supporting Israel, and voted for letting men play women’s sports. He even wants to impeach President Trump. I’m tied with Ossoff in the polls, but if we can’t keep pace , our message will be drowned out and we’ll fall behind. We need a surge of small-dollar donations to keep our ads running, hire staff, travel the state, and win this campaign. Jon Ossoff stands with Democrat party bosses and their radical base, not everyday Georgians. We can’t wait to put the pedal down. President Trump needs backup and Georgia needs a new senator. Thank you, Maj. Gen. John King (ret.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. body:

Go to China and try to buy land.

Now, try buying land near their military bases.

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Fighting for our keiki
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Aloha Peter, I know how fortunate I am to represent Hawaii. We are such a unique place, and one where the culture and language of our indigenous, Native Hawaiian community, in some degree, is part of our everyday lives. I use Hawaiian words as part of my day-to-day vocabulary, including these two — _ohana_ , or family, and _keiki_ , or children. Helping Hawaii’s families and children is one of the reasons I entered public service. It’s a responsibility I take very seriously. When I arrived in Hawaii at eight years old, my mother worked low-wage jobs with no health benefits, and I worried that we would lose everything if my mother fell ill. No child should face such circumstances. **That’s why I’m fighting hard in the Senate to ensure that Hawaii’s families and our keiki have the resources they need to thrive.** Republicans have chosen a different approach. Instead of fighting to deliver for working families, they just passed a bill that sells our children’s futures down the river and kicks millions of Americans off their health insurance to line the pockets of their billionaire allies. **[I refuse to sit quietly while Republicans betray millions of people in Hawaii and across the country. That’s why I’m asking: Will you please pitch in ahead of tomorrow’s mid-month fundraising deadline to help me continue fighting for our keiki, working families, and our future?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111468114/557360431/124025968?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250714_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmM4NzFmOS1lZTYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mcyb0SprZI-ANrg7Ifxw3f9M-D9KHCb09isfNlhuch0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111468115/557360432/1126229899?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250714_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmM4NzFmOS1lZTYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mcyb0SprZI-ANrg7Ifxw3f9M-D9KHCb09isfNlhuch0=)

name: David Hogg
subject: It’s not about young vs. old
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I want to clear something up.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250714-1&t=1&akid=2381%2E587540%2EbGnS9H)
Peter,
I want to clear something up.
This movement we’re building at Leaders We Deserve?
**It’s not about young vs. old. It’s about change vs. the status quo.**
And the truth is, a lot of the people fueling this work — donating, showing up, believing in us — are _not_ Gen Z.
They’re older folks who see what’s broken in our politics and want better for the future. They don’t see young people as a threat. They see us as a chance.
That’s something I think about a lot. Because when I talk about electing young leaders, I’m not just talking about our generation — I’m talking about people of all ages who are tired of the same old excuses, the same politicians cashing checks from the gun lobby or dragging their feet while our planet burns.
The support we get from older donors, volunteers, and advocates is a reminder: This fight _isn’t_ generational warfare. It’s a coalition — across ages, states, and experiences — coming together to demand something better.
If you’re someone who’s helped power this work, I want to say thank you.
Thank you for believing in young people.
Thank you for choosing change over comfort.
And thank you for proving that progress takes _all_ of us.
**[Will you pitch in $5 or anything you can to keep fueling this movement?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250714_1_youngvsold?refcode=em20250714-2381&amount=5&refcode2=2381_587540_bGnS9H&akid=2381%2E587540%2EbGnS9H)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250714_1_youngvsold?amount=5&refcode=em20250714-2381&refcode2=2381_587540_bGnS9H&akid=2381%2E587540%2EbGnS9H)**
With hope and persistence,
David Hogg
Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250714-1&t=2&refcode2=2381_587540_bGnS9H&akid=2381%2E587540%2EbGnS9H)**

subject: To ALL of Mark Kelly’s supporters: Please, don’t click away

body:
When Mark Kelly thinks about his most important supporters, it isn't the people that write the biggest checks who come to mind.
#

When Mark Kelly thinks about his most important supporters, it isn't the people that write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you.
---

Your support has been critical in helping Mark combat MAGA extremism.
Because of you, Mark is serving in the United States Senate — holding the line against President Trump, standing in the breach against the worst that this administration is trying to do.
---

But here’s something we thought you should know: Out of all the people who read these emails, less than 25% of them have made a donation to support his work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that important group.

Mark’s average online donation is around $30. Most people chip in much less than that. But with President Trump pushing our democracy to the brink, all that matters is that you are supporting Mark at a time he needs it most.
We’ll put it right to work not just in Arizona, but around the country. Mark is on the frontlines of this fight, and he is not going to back down.

name: Rob Bonta
subject: Trump’s latest attack on schools
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250714&t=1001&akid=1875%2E1088799%2E44xwFG ]Rob Bonta

I filed our 31st lawsuit
against the Trump administration today. Here’s why:

Without rhyme, reason, or legal basis, Trump has decided to freeze more
than $6 billion in federal education funding for programs administered by
the Department of Education — just weeks before kids go back to school.

This unconstitutional and unlawful decision puts things like before and
after-school programs, summer learning, classroom technology, and English
language learning at risk — and throws planning for the upcoming school
year into total chaos.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250714-pet/?t=1002&akid=1875%2E1088799%2E44xwFG ]Freezing this funding — which includes an estimated $939 million in
funds for California alone — directly harms our students, and it’s against
the law. If you’re with me in the fight to hold Trump and his
administration accountable, please sign on today.

The Constitution is clear: It’s Congress that holds the power of the
purse, not the President. My lawsuit, filed along with 23 attorneys
general and two states, asks the court to block any attempts by the Trump
administration to withhold or delay this critical funding from the
schools, parents, and students who rely on it.

Like so many of Trump’s actions, this massive funding freeze is blatantly
illegal — and I’m confident the court will agree. If you’re with me, show
your support by adding your name today:

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250714-pet/?t=1003&akid=1875%2E1088799%2E44xwFG ]ADD YOUR NAME

More to come,
Rob

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Unsubscribe: https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=1875%2E1088799%2E44xwFG

Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026

1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6a97408001aa4c6bbb560f0728601e50&_e=O_keuW9w70rhpDfQBQDqgheeghAPda75I2Jul3stz2ABEJEMqBtFaXV6KjuPJT8eIb9nRMLbwl0ZrAvw_O4uqVCN_nyBd18ZSj_-6PjZujBnFL22Hn8K3SKHFtw1Edl62v92tn7w2kT-lQBY2hv6TVC6tK07baf04E3WBk7t9xtvc8TMdr9InGpPEA5RjgmTYl1OW-z1etqA3Dp1t79GRiV2jziYhdpbVjy1Weqf9dGRzgBA4Dimtk-glLLNad1EGGcdfG6nBXBh-gCjmFYjeDZKBCfb6kQpOC1MhVF0p3ST2plrRS_pcb9RH_YV2gcE7Q0EEHcsk7B-Ghy6cc0oURzR3l7yhcIm4TWfW7huNnmBCEvpfQPsYg9rLvqTI7V0c94FkWAeGnjUC4svvpMXsav-BiRlJ8BUvWik0bNhB9PTdXJVVp1BIC5l9_Nv31HN1m9E-nsg-YfHNSPYe4meOwqwrt44bPqerTN0rjCQ3iwk5_XSZaS94MPSvE8fVcPKsG2X3MznscQ_61I0pzaCIRpR3C3F3dxVFL5wJo6KdWM1kGRn8dyfdR2AcUiq7a-j)

name: Team Pou
subject: We have an opponent.
body:
Our race just got tougher.

| |
---
Team, We've never minced words: our race is a top target for House Republicans. Nellie has now drawn another opponent, and we expect millions of dollars to flow into our district in an attempt to tarnish her record of standing up for New Jersey families. These are the same people who stand for The Big Scam — the disastrous national GOP bill that guts Medicaid, defunds hospitals, and hands more tax breaks to billionaires. They don’t care about New Jersey. They care about power and themselves. We’re launching our mid-month fundraising push today. We need to raise $2,000 by midnight tomorrow to stay on track. We need to fight back now, not just to reelect Nellie, but to take back the House and hold House Republicans accountable for their disastrous, big, ugly bill. **[This district is one of the most competitive in the country. Hitting each and every one of our goals is how we show we're ready to fight back. clean_body: Our race just got tougher. | | Team, We've never minced words: our race is a top target for House Republicans. Nellie has now drawn another opponent, and we expect millions of dollars to flow into our district in an attempt to tarnish her record of standing up for New Jersey families. These are the same people who stand for The Big Scam — the disastrous national GOP bill that guts Medicaid, defunds hospitals, and hands more tax breaks to billionaires. They don’t care about New Jersey. They care about power and themselves. We’re launching our mid-month fundraising push today. We need to raise $2,000 by midnight tomorrow to stay on track. We need to fight back now, not just to reelect Nellie, but to take back the House and hold House Republicans accountable for their disastrous, big, ugly bill. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. name: Comeback Kid
subject: He was Babied into a Win… Let’s Correct it ->
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
I wish I didn’t have to write this, Friend.
But last week, Randy Fine, the man who beat me in the recent special election, posted something so hateful , so dangerous , that it’s impossible to ignore .
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4C373551573058466A697A4C2F61555566555773377855694A716C4A53646768705A41385844576C4A464B6F654C464B444266734D77354736346456366F6867/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-14%20at%202.10.00%E2%80%AFPM.png]
And when national leaders condemned him, he doubled down with a smug “Boo hoo.”
Let’s be honest about what this is, a disgrace to the office he holds.
But here’s the part that keeps me up at night: the disgusting gerrymandering and bankrolling we saw earlier this year led to this.
We ran against Randy Fine because we believed our state deserves better than cruelty, extremism, and performative hate. We came up short in that race, but moved the needle 16 points to the left.
This movement didn’t end there. I’m running for U.S. Senate because we need to stop this from becoming Florida’s future.
If you’re tired of leaders who demonize their opponents and divide their communities, let’s prove that compassion can win. That courage can beat fear. That we can replace MAGA’s brand of politics with something that actually lifts people up by defeating Ashley Moody in 2026.
👊Chip in now and help us build a campaign that fights for dignity, democracy, and decency. All it takes is $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
We have the chance to do something bigger in 2026. Let’s make sure we do.
Together,
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.05.04%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
Josh Weil for US Senate
5800 Beach Blvd. STE 203-337
Jacksonville, FL 32207
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Aaf_6fc98kqPfx3FNr4mUQ2?unsubscribedata=PJlwEHJ3E6biXATqUcNRG0ovpHNCTzrNdHARrzwYHPgV3Kc4OLIWNUn65lThG9XzLKIBvX5%2FX3V8P%2Bz0Z6q2ln71gYYnWoWObM8Pb%2BBAImI2p6mNn7gSyYGqUllr6zZSDzWotVhq4qh32h3LDR4ac9xde18GNJl9i1c60cSTpzonT9cufX4bnmqNp2xcMYQM%2Bk3sJABolBCfjUWwnazSVingQeCDptu9hBx5abovmazjl22TcTWhx7Ccf%2B2unqechsFToPSyq08F8UgVkc18M8DuzUW4f6w8AAs4UDzGMgvO%2ByWf6yAAe6ptiPu6x0k604ATIiDCaonVDO6Lo97dajLK%2BDM630cnku0bnb%2FzoxBWsSTHrTY%2FzVNl1mGy3UoIvFV4flyhCAxmqDve05v8UPobxa7wCDgwpfc93VjKK3H1fPcrSnEepqehgZMCAVO2 .

Friend, The Trump administration's coverup of the Jeffrey Epstein investigations finding has triggered a nuclear meltdown amongst their base, many of whom voted for Trump based on the **_now defunct notion_****** that he would bring justice to the elites implicated in the high-level human trafficking ring. If Democrats are willing to launch an investigation of their own we can bring these dejected voters into our coalition for the 2026 midterms (or at a minimum ensure they don't vote Republican). **And that 's exactly what House Democrats appear to be doing:**

subject: We're living out their reality

body:
Voter Action Project
Courier: Trump's executive orders seem to be ripped right from the pages of Project 2025 [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=CnErP/kH7+C4uFNjH+MWZy1SLQDsdfYJuVbTw3pXlK8sSmAMolrFlFMIiPTPoIs9Np6r0aQHO+pVYIr0IwKbz2PuoVP2MddWOr1SXE0PgBQ=]
Remember when opponents of voting rights spent 2024 disavowing the Heritage Foundation's "Project 2025", Team? Now that they're in control they are following that playbook line by line.
Organized by the Heritage Foundation, a right-wing, dark money, inside-the-beltway, anti-voting think tank , and advised by more than 100 conservative groups, Project 2025 put forth a 922-page list of policy recommendations, going agency by agency in the federal government.
So far the Trump administration has followed Project 2025 in five major ways:
➜ Filling the administration with the authors of Project 2025. From installing Russell Vought, the main author, as head of the Office of Management and Budget to making the head of the FCC section head of the FCC to and more, the author's list has been appointed to powerful positions en masse.
➜ Mass firings in the civil service. Elon Musk's DOGE team started with a buyout scheme for federal employees and when that failed, moved to layoffs. The Supreme Court recently cleared the path for mass firings. Project 2025 calls for replacing the open positions with MAGA henchmen.
➜ Military immigration enforcement. They've deployed U.S. troops on our domestic borders, with ongoing operations in Los Angeles supporting ICE and their operations to round up anyone who might not be a legal immigrant -- with a lot of legal Americans wrongly arrested.
➜ Persecuting transgender Americans. The Trump administration has attacked gender identity across the board.
➜ Environmental rollbacks. From pulling out of the Paris Climate Accords (again) to opening Alaska's land to drilling to valuing fossil fuels over all other forms of energy production, they're dismantling environmental regulation piece by piece.
We're just six months in. If they've already accomplished all this, you can bet Project 2025's recommendations for voter suppression are coming soon . We must use this playbook of theirs against them and fight back however we can.
Please, step up and fuel our efforts to defend our fundamental right to vote and more with $25 or whatever you can today >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=CnErP/kH7+C4uFNjH+MWZy1SLQDsdfYJuVbTw3pXlK8sSmAMolrFlFMIiPTPoIs9Np6r0aQHO+pVYIr0IwKbz2PuoVP2MddWOr1SXE0PgBQ=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]

As part of our regular monthly online series, “What Can Be Done,” this Wednesday we will tackle ways to build pressure to stop the federal slide into authoritarianism because while the chaos in Congress can give mind-numbing whiplash, we are not powerless.
We’ll review the latest federal attacks on working people and how we can take action in-person and online to fight back.

Border czar Tom Homan defended ICE agents wearing masks **[during a tense interview with Politico,](https://substack.com/redirect/535c532d-bc2c-4d54-ac75-265ebe01a720?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** citing a massive increase in attacks on federal immigration officers and arguing the protective measure is necessary as agents and their families face unprecedented targeting and doxxing by left wing activists.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/535c532d-bc2c-4d54-ac75-265ebe01a720?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/535c532d-bc2c-4d54-ac75-265ebe01a720?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Homan challenged Politico's Dasha Burns to "name a police agency that has a 700% increase in assaults" when she compared it to other law enforcement. Burns admitted she hadn't looked at that data and couldn't provide such an example.
**["You won't find one. The attacks on ICE is unprecedented, 700% increased.](https://substack.com/redirect/535c532d-bc2c-4d54-ac75-265ebe01a720?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** And we're not even talking about the doxing of agents, their spouses, and their children," Homan explained. "So they're wearing masks to help give them some sort of protection."
When Burns suggested the masks were problematic, Homan pointed out the hypocrisy of critics who never complained about BLM protesters wearing masks or masked college protesters who "threatened Jewish students and took over buildings, destroyed property." He noted that no legislation was passed to ban masks during those protests.
"The same people that are complaining about ICE wearing masks, have they ever said anything about BLM protesters wearing masks?!" Homan fired back.
**[Homan ended the interview by declaring "zero tolerance" for attacks on agents](https://substack.com/redirect/535c532d-bc2c-4d54-ac75-265ebe01a720?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who are "trying to make this country safe again" but are being "vilified for it and attacked for it." He emphasized that the level of protection is necessary given the unprecedented nature of the threats.

[ Click to Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/535c532d-bc2c-4d54-ac75-265ebe01a720?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**President Trump 's "One Big Beautiful Bill" strives to deliver the largest tax cuts for working and middle class Americans in our country's history.** His bold plan not only extends the historic 2017 tax cuts but introduces even deeper reforms aimed at empowering American workers and retirees.
If you are retired or near retirement, this could mean more money in your savings and a once-in-a-generation opportunity to help protect lasting wealth--**if you 're prepared**.
**But here 's the catch:**
This new economic agenda may come with both massive opportunity and serious risk for anyone with a traditional retirement account--like a 401(k), IRA, or TSP.
The fatal flaw? These accounts are built on a Wall Street system that assumes stability, free from manipulation and political shocks.
And in today's world, all it could take is one major event--another bank failure, a geopolitical crisis, a market crash--to wipe out decades of your savings like it did in the 2008 Financial Crisis.
**If you have a retirement account and want to help safeguard --not just survive--during Trump's economic revolution, this is your wake-up call.**
We've outlined a wealth protection strategy inside the **[2025 Retirement Protection Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/81e7041b-6af5-4fec-82b0-3e90964be1cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** -- and it's completely FREE.
**Inside this guide, you'll discover an IRS-approved loophole that allows you to move your retirement savings tax-free and penalty-free into a safe haven asset and hedge your wealth against inflation, market volatility and geopolitical crises.**
**Time is short.** Trump's reforms may be coming fast--and the financial system roller coaster may be a ride that you don't want to take with your retirement savings.

# **Kristi Noem SHUTS DOWN Kristen Welker when bold accusations CROSS the LINE**
Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem **[fired back at NBC News' Kristen Welker](https://substack.com/redirect/92b344b7-b96d-4238-aede-dfa1ad59fa93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for suggesting that she and the Trump administration failed Texas flood victims by not re-upping FEMA contracts in a timely manner.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/92b344b7-b96d-4238-aede-dfa1ad59fa93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/92b344b7-b96d-4238-aede-dfa1ad59fa93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"This is really unfortunate, we have so many individuals playing politics with what happened in Texas," Noem told Welker.
Welker pressed Noem on claims that her mismanagement lead to slow responsiveness to flood victims.
"The NY Times is reporting that thousands of calls from flood victims to FEMA call centers went unanswered in the middle of this ongoing disaster because you didn't renew contracts to keep call center staff in place until nearly 1 week after the floods," Welker said. "Why did it take so long to extend those contracts?"
"It's just false, those contracts were in place, no employees were off of work,... fake news. It's discouraging!" Noem fired back.
Noem demanded that reports that only 15% of calls to FEMA were answered be validated and **[asked for those who reported the information to put their names out](https://substack.com/redirect/92b344b7-b96d-4238-aede-dfa1ad59fa93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** publicly to back up their claims.
"The false reporting is inappropriate, and needs to be cleared up," Noem added.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/92b344b7-b96d-4238-aede-dfa1ad59fa93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Biden 's chief of staff reportedly behind last minute autopen pardons**
A senior Biden administration advisor was responsible for last minute autopen pardons, not the president himself, **[according to a new report.](https://substack.com/redirect/a611936d-d759-4dbd-badf-86716342e79d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a611936d-d759-4dbd-badf-86716342e79d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Chief of staff approved high-profile autopen pardons in Biden 's final hours**: The former president's chief of staff, Jeff Zients, gave final approval for several preemptive pardons signed using an autopen, including those for Anthony Fauci and Gen. Mark Milley, the _New York Times_ reported. The approvals came in the late hours of Jan. 19, after a meeting with Biden and top aides. "I approve the use of the autopen for the execution of all of the following pardons," Zients wrote in an email.
* **Trump slams autopen use, calls it historic scandal** : President Donald Trump reacted to the report, alleging Biden did not know what he was signing. "I guarantee you he knew nothing about what he was signing," Trump told reporters Monday. He called the autopen use "possibly one of the biggest scandals that we've had in 50 to 100 years."
* **White House accused of cover-up over clemency process** : White House spokesperson Harrison Fields criticized Biden's record, saying the report revealed a major cover-up scheme. "The truth will come out about who was, in fact, running the country... just as the truth is emerging about the state of Joe Biden's cognitive and physical health," Fields wrote in an email to Fox News.
* **Biden issued over 4,000 clemency acts, most in final months** : Biden granted 4,245 acts of clemency during his presidency, with 96% issued between October 2024 and January 2025, per Pew Research. The _Times_ noted Biden did not personally approve each name but instead approved broad criteria used to determine eligibility. Trump has since ordered an investigation into whether the autopen use was tied to Biden's mental decline.

# **Left-wing DA plans to let sex offender who attacked school recess go free**
The 18th Judicial District Attorney's Office in Colorado plans to **[dismiss charges against a registered sex offender Solomon Galligan,](https://substack.com/redirect/6270dd74-4636-4dc3-be38-2c45006f3923?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **accused of attempting to kidnap an 11-year-old boy from Black Forest Hills Elementary School in April. Prosecutors said Galligan was deemed mentally incompetent to stand trial following a court-ordered evaluation.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d9c658fb-fea5-4134-9509-c9084d514bc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: Aurora police department
* **Alleged attack caught on video, but trial ruled out** : The alleged incident was captured on video, showing Galligan chasing and grabbing at a student during recess as other children fled. "It's super scary to watch," said Dante White, a parent at the school. Despite video evidence, prosecutors say they are unable to proceed due to Galligan's mental health status.
* **Progressive DA of Colorado is allegedly responsible for release:** Amy Padden is an advocate for alternative incarceration methods, most notably giving only probation and community service to an illegal alien who killed a 24-year-old citizen by driving over 90 mph in a 45 mph zone.
* **School leadership changed after security response criticized** : Parents submitted a 10-page letter to Cherry Creek School District officials demanding a review of the school's response. The investigation led to the replacement of then-principal Amanda Replogle, who later acknowledged a "clear misstep" in not putting the school on secure status immediately following the incident.
* **District implements safety reforms post-incident** : The Cherry Creek School District said it has since implemented heightened security, including increased presence of safety personnel, and mental health supports for students. These measures also include the option for indoor recess for students' safety and comfort.

# Supreme Court votes in favor of Trump's DOA cuts in major administration victory
**[The Supreme Court voted Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/0827ebe3-6bc2-4136-87d9-39571afd07e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in a 6-3 decision to back President Trump's cuts to the Department of Education in a major victory for the administration.
* **The Supreme Court cleared the for the Trump administration to carry out deep staffing cuts,** putting a hold on a lower court order that would have forced the rehiring of about 1,400 employees.
* **The staffing reductions had been blocked in May by a Biden-appointed judge** , who said the move of cutting nearly half the department's workforce could violate federal employment protections and agency guidelines, ultimately dismantling the entire division.
* **Education Secretary Linda McMahon welcomed the high court 's decision**, saying it reaffirmed the president's authority to restructure federal agencies and deliver on promised reforms. "Today, the Supreme Court again confirmed the obvious: the President of the United States, as the head of the Executive Branch, has the ultimate authority to make decisions about staffing levels, administrative organization, and day-to-day operations of federal agencies," McMahon said. "While today's ruling is a significant win for students and families, it is a shame that the highest court in the land had to step in to allow President Trump to advance the reforms Americans elected him to deliver using the authorities granted to him by the U.S. Constitution."
* **The court 's three liberal justices dissented**, with Justice Sonia Sotomayor warning that the judiciary should step in when the executive branch signals it intends to defy the law.

Trump has since ordered an investigation into whether the autopen use was tied to Biden's mental decline. Left-wing DA plans to let sex offender who attacked school recess go free The 18th Judicial District Attorney's Office in Colorado plans to accused of attempting to kidnap an 11-year-old boy from Black Forest Hills Elementary School in April. Prosecutors said Galligan was deemed mentally incompetent to stand trial following a court-ordered evaluation. | | ---|---|--- Source: Aurora police department Alleged attack caught on video, but trial ruled out : The alleged incident was captured on video, showing Galligan chasing and grabbing at a student during recess as other children fled. "It's super scary to watch," said Dante White, a parent at the school. Despite video evidence, prosecutors say they are unable to proceed due to Galligan's mental health status. Progressive DA of Colorado is allegedly responsible for release: Amy Padden is an advocate for alternative incarceration methods, most notably giving only probation and community service to an illegal alien who killed a 24-year-old citizen by driving over 90 mph in a 45 mph zone. School leadership changed after security response criticized : Parents submitted a 10-page letter to Cherry Creek School District officials demanding a review of the school's response. The investigation led to the replacement of then-principal Amanda Replogle, who later acknowledged a "clear misstep" in not putting the school on secure status immediately following the incident. District implements safety reforms post-incident : The Cherry Creek School District said it has since implemented heightened security, including increased presence of safety personnel, and mental health supports for students. These measures also include the option for indoor recess for students' safety and comfort. Supreme Court votes in favor of Trump's DOA cuts in major administration victory in a 6-3 decision to back President Trump's cuts to the Department of Education in a major victory for the administration. The Supreme Court cleared the for the Trump administration to carry out deep staffing cuts, putting a hold on a lower court order that would have forced the rehiring of about 1,400 employees. The staffing reductions had been blocked in May by a Biden-appointed judge , who said the move of cutting nearly half the department's workforce could violate federal employment protections and agency guidelines, ultimately dismantling the entire division. Education Secretary Linda McMahon welcomed the high court 's decision, saying it reaffirmed the president's authority to restructure federal agencies and deliver on promised reforms. "Today, the Supreme Court again confirmed the obvious: the President of the United States, as the head of the Executive Branch, has the ultimate authority to make decisions about staffing levels, administrative organization, and day-to-day operations of federal agencies," McMahon said. "While today's ruling is a significant win for students and families, it is a shame that the highest court in the land had to step in to allow President Trump to advance the reforms Americans elected him to deliver using the authorities granted to him by the U.S. Constitution." The court 's three liberal justices dissented, with Justice Sonia Sotomayor warning that the judiciary should step in when the executive branch signals it intends to defy the law. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Asking for $6
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We must speak out.
#

Hi team, Gabby Giffords here with a personal request.
[**Is there anything I could say for you to contribute $6 to GIFFORDS PAC before our mid-month deadline expires tomorrow?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/63712?c0=giffords-em-july25.dHWhmU&refcode=em250714-1-b&t=1&akid=10677%2E3935704%2EoXzlko)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $6](https://go.giffords.org/go/63713?c0=giffords-em-july25.iUFgao&refcode=em250714-1-b&t=2&akid=10677%2E3935704%2EoXzlko)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july25.lWZeCS&refcode=em250714-1-b&t=3&akid=10677%2E3935704%2EoXzlko)**
---
****
I hope you will give me a minute to explain why I’m asking for your support today.
Right now, the Trump administration is trying to roll back all of our progress on gun violence in real time.
They removed a memorial at the ATF commemorating lives lost by gun violence. They then worked with a far-right group to essentially legalize machine guns. And just days ago, Donald Trump signed his “Big Beautiful Bill” into law — which will make it easier for dangerous gun silencers to infiltrate our communities.
This is not okay. We cannot let Trump and his allies erase our progress without paying a political price. That’s why I’m asking for your $6 donation today.
$6 to help us build a grassroots team that can hold the gun lobby accountable.
$6 to elect _real_ leaders and pass lifesaving legislation across the country.
$6 to elect a new Congress who will put our communities first.
$6 might not seem like a lot — but when 5,000 or even 10,000 people give what they can, it adds up. Someone has already given $6 by the time you read this, and they’re hoping you do the same.
[**Will you help us keep up the chain reaction? Contribute $6 — or whatever you can afford — to GIFFORDS PAC before our mid-month deadline tomorrow night.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/63712?c0=giffords-em-july25.dHWhmU&refcode=em250714-1-b&t=4&akid=10677%2E3935704%2EoXzlko)

---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-july25.Pa0HtQ&refcode=em250714-1-b&t=6&akid=10677%2E3935704%2EoXzlko)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-july25.kqPk76&refcode=em250714-1-b&t=7&akid=10677%2E3935704%2EoXzlko)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-july25.fCKs9x&refcode=em250714-1-b&t=8&akid=10677%2E3935704%2EoXzlko)**

Thank you for your support.
— Gabby

[HOUSE APPROVES TRUMP'S REQUEST TO CUT FUNDING FOR _PBS_](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64242?t=3&akid=23211%2E4449941%2EpQtTS2)** Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and Marjorie Taylor Greene are fighting to defund programs like Sesame Street, _PBS,_ and _NPR._

They're claiming that Sesame Street brainwashes viewers and children with "communist" agendas and promotes "anti-American" views.

_**But now,**_**PBS _is fighting back. They just SUED the Trump administration!_**

[**_So we 're BEGGING you to stand with _PBS_ in the face of Trump's attacks!! Will you add your name to show your support for _PBS_ right now?!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64242?t=4&akid=23211%2E4449941%2EpQtTS2) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64242?t=5&akid=23211%2E4449941%2EpQtTS2)

---

It's critically important we fight back. If we fail:

-> **FIRST:** Millions of Americans would lose access to educational and news programming.

-> **SECOND:** Beloved programs like Sesame Street and Curious George and local sports coverage would be SHUT DOWN.

-> **THIRD:** The GOP's hateful, anti-journalist agenda will gain momentum. Their lies about 'propaganda' inside public programming will continue dividing our country.

A top executive at _PBS_ put it perfectly: **" There's nothing more American than _PBS._ "**

We know that many Americans agree with us that we can't let the GOP's political games result in us losing educational staples like Sesame Street.
[**_We need every good Democrat to show their support for _PBS_ right away. Please, sign on before it's too late:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64242?t=7&akid=23211%2E4449941%2EpQtTS2)

Thanks for taking action, friend.

If you would like to get fewer emails, If you would like to unsubscribe, BREAKING NEWS: Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and Marjorie Taylor Greene are fighting to defund programs like Sesame Street, PBS, and NPR. They're claiming that Sesame Street brainwashes viewers and children with "communist" agendas and promotes "anti-American" views. But now,PBS is fighting back. They just SUED the Trump administration! | It's critically important we fight back. If we fail: -> FIRST: Millions of Americans would lose access to educational and news programming. -> SECOND: Beloved programs like Sesame Street and Curious George and local sports coverage would be SHUT DOWN. -> THIRD: The GOP's hateful, anti-journalist agenda will gain momentum. Their lies about 'propaganda' inside public programming will continue dividing our country. A top executive at PBS put it perfectly: " There's nothing more American than PBS. **_[See it here](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e305822/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9lYXJseS12b3RlL2V2YV9kb25fb21fZXJfc3AtbmpfcnNfMjAyNTA3MTQv/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA3MTQ/LbmNsQjc2dXFQeA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjA5NzRfZnRkMSZfbmxpZD1UVWtyTkpzS1pUJl9uaGlkcz1uYzVxbXUxNllTV0JrbWxz/gaHV0oA/s5u7f7bfb51)_.**
After our resounding victory in Pennsylvania in the 2024 election, Early Vote Action is doubling down on our proven voter registration strategy. We have hired more staffers in PA, and we are registering new Republican voters in New Jersey every day ahead of their November 2025 election.
We have a chance to shock the political landscape, and all signs are pointing towards a huge Republican turnout in November.
New Jersey is our next chance to win a major election and now is the time to kick into overdrive. The enthusiasm and opportunity is here, we just need to execute on the mission at hand.
That’s why I reached out to you.

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: It’s official, folks: We have our first GOP opponent.
body:
|
#
It’s official, folks. **We have our first GOP opponent here in MI-08 – and I need your help right now to hold the line.** **[We set a $10,000 rapid response goal to kick off this next phase of this race. Can you chip in $3 or more today to help us fight back](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111470623/557368978/1362877131?refcode=em-7.14.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjVmMGM1Ny1mODYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tgsrXFEJN8tnf1-fT1eWnQqIbcldlDg5z1lu6VlZV40=)****[?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111470624/557368979/1362877131?refcode=em-7.14.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjVmMGM1Ny1mODYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tgsrXFEJN8tnf1-fT1eWnQqIbcldlDg5z1lu6VlZV40=)** | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111470625/557368980/1362877131?refcode=em-7.14.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjVmMGM1Ny1mODYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tgsrXFEJN8tnf1-fT1eWnQqIbcldlDg5z1lu6VlZV40=)
---
Here’s what we know:
Our new opponent is being pushed by GOP insiders – and he’s already parroting the far-right’s favorite talking points. In fact, he even said he’d vote yes on Trump’s disastrous budget bill that guts Medicaid and SNAP benefits hurting the very working families we’re fighting for in Mid-Michigan.
**He’s not running to represent this community – he’s running to carry out a national agenda that leaves our neighbors behind.**
We know that national Republicans are all-in to win this race. MAGA Super PACs have already spent nearly $800,000 attacking me, including $150,000 from Donald Trump’s own PAC. Last cycle, they dropped a staggering _$12.5 million_ trying to defeat me – and we expect even more this time around.
MI-08 is a Trump-won district and one of the most competitive in the country. If they flip this seat, Democrats lose a critical firewall – and our path to taking back the House gets that much harder.
We can’t afford to wait. We have to respond immediately to show we’re ready to fight back.
[**So folks, if you’re able, please rush in a donation of $3 before midnight tonight. I wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111470626/557368981/1362877131?refcode=em-7.14.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjVmMGM1Ny1mODYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tgsrXFEJN8tnf1-fT1eWnQqIbcldlDg5z1lu6VlZV40=)

name: Beth Van Duyne
subject: If they take me out… Texas is next
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:

**_Original Message From Seth:_**

Peter,

Trump’s Big Bad Bill is devastating to Americans.

**But because of YOU, some bad parts of the bill were removed.** Your voice MATTERS. The final version of the bill did not include the sale of public lands, and pushed off many of the worst health care cuts until after the Midterms. Public pressure matters, and you helped prove it.

Still, the Big Bad Bill will hurt Rhode Island families, cutting health care, food benefits, and more. **And we need to win back control of Congress to reverse it.**

[The fight for a House majority in the midterms has already begun. Can you make a donation of $10 today to show the strength of our unity and organization?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111470782/557369485/1420690541?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250714_FR_MMFR_0_1MO_MagazinerforCongress_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzRmMjZlOC1mODYwLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o9K2Eq3Kzww5PapPJMH3OipjIkGsoIt05G2ij2JdLVw=)

name: DNC Community Engagement
subject: DNC & ASDC Held 138 Town Halls Nationwide on Trump’s Health Care-Ripping and Tax Scam
body:
| | | | | |
---
|
---
|
# DNC and ASDC Holds 138 “People’s Town Halls” in All 50 States to Hold GOP Accountable For Trump’s Tax Scam That Rips Away Health Care
---
| | | On Friday, the DNC and ASDC completed a “People’s Town Hall” in Utah featuring Rep. Sara Jacobs which meant that the DNC and ASDC passed a significant milestone: completing **138 People’s Town Halls in all 50 states** to hold Republicans accountable for passing their disastrous budget betrayal — cutting health care coverage from 17 million people and being too cowardly to meet with their constituents about it.

Republicans [refused](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1eb2d52746&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to meet with their constituents during the debate of their bill, which will kick 17 million Americans off health care, could reduce or eliminate critical food benefits for 22 million Americans, and sets the US on a path towards an economic crisis.

In response, the DNC and ASDC set up [“People’s Town Halls”](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ac1900c62f&e=d6c5c7d7ec) in all 50 states to directly communicate to those most affected by Republicans’ billionaire budget betrayal. After accomplishing this goal, the DNC, ASDC, and our sister committees are now turning to “Organizing Summer” — a full-out organizing blitz to build strong Democratic power in the states through robust virtual and in-person organizing events and voter registration efforts in targeted states and districts along with voter registration efforts.

Now more than ever, Democrats are putting in the work to capture voters’ energy, drive our message, and mobilize an army of empowered voters ready to reject Republicans’ extreme agenda and elect Democrats up and down the ballot.

_**DNC Chair Ken Martin released the following statement:**_
“I ran for DNC Chair to get the DNC out of DC and that’s exactly what we are doing with our ‘People’s Town Halls.’ Over the past four months, we've done what Republicans refused to do — met with voters, listened to their concerns, and brought those concerns back to Washington to fight against this disastrous budget bill. From the rubiest of red districts to blue districts, voters came out in droves to hold Republicans accountable for cheating their own constituents out of health care, food, and money in order to line the pockets of their billionaire donors. What we learned from these town halls is that voters are ready to hold Republicans accountable for their votes. This fight is far from over. This summer, Democrats will be on the ground organizing — meeting voters in every corner of the country, cultivating voter energy, hosting robust voter engagement events, and building Democratic power in the states that will carry us to victory not just in 2025 and 2026 but for many years to come.”
_**ASDC President Jane Kleeb issued the following statement:**_
“Democrats are showing up, listening and taking action. We are not afraid of hearing from voters who want serious changes to the way our country is being governed, from the immigration system to funding our public schools. Republicans continue to show they are cruel and afraid of the people. State parties are continuing to organize all over the country to recruit candidates and register voters so we can win elections up and down the ballot to restore trust and hope in America.”
---

Now more than ever, Democrats are putting in the work to capture voters’ energy, drive our message, and mobilize an army of empowered voters ready to reject Republicans’ extreme agenda and elect Democrats up and down the ballot. DNC Chair Ken Martin released the following statement: “I ran for DNC Chair to get the DNC out of DC and that’s exactly what we are doing with our ‘People’s Town Halls.’ Over the past four months, we've done what Republicans refused to do — met with voters, listened to their concerns, and brought those concerns back to Washington to fight against this disastrous budget bill. From the rubiest of red districts to blue districts, voters came out in droves to hold Republicans accountable for cheating their own constituents out of health care, food, and money in order to line the pockets of their billionaire donors. What we learned from these town halls is that voters are ready to hold Republicans accountable for their votes. This fight is far from over. This summer, Democrats will be on the ground organizing — meeting voters in every corner of the country, cultivating voter energy, hosting robust voter engagement events, and building Democratic power in the states that will carry us to victory not just in 2025 and 2026 but for many years to come.” ASDC President Jane Kleeb issued the following statement: “Democrats are showing up, listening and taking action. We are not afraid of hearing from voters who want serious changes to the way our country is being governed, from the immigration system to funding our public schools. Republicans continue to show they are cruel and afraid of the people. State parties are continuing to organize all over the country to recruit candidates and register voters so we can win elections up and down the ballot to restore trust and hope in America.” | ### | | | | | | | | | | | | | | DNC Community Engagement 430 S Capitol Street, SE Washington, DC 20003 * USA or |

If my name and face are familiar, it's not just because I ran for Congress in 2024.

For more than 30 years, I was a TV news anchor, uplifting the stories of Central Pennsylvanians. I flew over New York City with the Pennsylvania National Guard after 9/11, delivered the heartbreaking news that _Roe v. Wade_ had been overturned on live television, and shared the stories of businesses closing, job losses, and families struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads.

**I am a dedicated truth teller with decades of experience standing up for our neighbors.**

Now I am working to replace former Freedom Caucus Chair and _**MAGA insurrectionist Scott Perry.**_

❌ He has praised the GOP budget bill that just passed. You know — the one that will kick millions of hard-working Americans off Medicaid, shutter rural hospitals, and give tax cuts to the wealthy 1%.
❌ He has supported a national abortion ban with no exceptions.
❌ He helped plan the January 6th insurrection, where Americans lost their lives.

Scott Perry is too extreme for PA-10, and we deserve better.

**PA-10 is a make-or-break district to flip the U.S. House.** We have a serious shot at winning this district, but my opponent is backed by mountains of dark money and billionaire donors. The support of grassroots donors like you is crucial to our success.

clean_body: | = Hi there. I'm Janelle Stelson, the Democrat running to oust Scott Perry in PA-10 — a major tossup district. In 2024, this was the second closest challenger race in the entire country — we lost by just 5,133 votes. We can flip this district from red to blue this time, but it is going to take every single one of us. = | = If my name and face are familiar, it's not just because I ran for Congress in 2024. For more than 30 years, I was a TV news anchor, uplifting the stories of Central Pennsylvanians. I flew over New York City with the Pennsylvania National Guard after 9/11, delivered the heartbreaking news that Roe v. Wade had been overturned on live television, and shared the stories of businesses closing, job losses, and families struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads. I am a dedicated truth teller with decades of experience standing up for our neighbors. Now I am working to replace former Freedom Caucus Chair and MAGA insurrectionist Scott Perry. ❌ He has praised the GOP budget bill that just passed. You know — the one that will kick millions of hard-working Americans off Medicaid, shutter rural hospitals, and give tax cuts to the wealthy 1%. ❌ He has supported a national abortion ban with no exceptions. ❌ He helped plan the January 6th insurrection, where Americans lost their lives. Scott Perry is too extreme for PA-10, and we deserve better. PA-10 is a make-or-break district to flip the U.S. House. We have a serious shot at winning this district, but my opponent is backed by mountains of dark money and billionaire donors. The support of grassroots donors like you is crucial to our success. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Janelle Stelson and New Dems will go through immediately: = = = = = Help us launch this campaign with the momentum we need to oust Scott Perry once and for all. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: RESPONSE REQUESTED: Add your name and DEMAND an investigation into Kristi Noem’s leadership at FEMA
body:
She imposed a directive requiring her personal approval for any contract, purchase, or grant over $100,000 — and a minimum of five days review for each.
#

Peter, we’ve all been horrified after the flooding in Texas over the Fourth of July weekend. More than 120 are dead, and more than 170 still missing.
That flooding was a natural disaster — an act of God — but this loss of possessions, property, lives... that was preventable. Kristi Noem is in charge of FEMA, an agency solely responsible for preparing for and responding to natural disasters like these. The people at FEMA are dedicated to their work, good at their jobs, and have saved countless lives over the years. They know what they’re doing, but it’s clear that Kristi Noem has absolutely no idea.
**I’m calling on FEMA’s Inspector General and demanding they open an investigation into Noem’s tenure as Secretary of Homeland Security** that does justice to the victims and family members impacted by this tragedy.
I’ll be straight up: This was Kristi Noem’s fault, and Donald Trump’s for letting her run FEMA like a used car lot. She imposed a directive requiring her personal approval for any contract, purchase, or grant over $100,000 — and a minimum of five days review for each. Hundreds of emergency call center operators were laid off IN THE MIDDLE OF THIS CRISIS because of that directive. People were calling for help, and the phones weren’t getting picked up.
While Kristi Noem is out playing dress up in El Salvador, mugging for the camera, cosplaying in body armor to look tough, this is what happens. She doesn’t want to do the job. She’s more obsessed with handcuffing United States Senators, deploying federal agents to crack down on lawful protesters, and pitching sick reality shows where immigrants compete for citizenship.
When you run an agency tasked with responding to emergencies immediately, that kind of theater, these kinds of directives... they aren’t just stupid — they’re dangerous, and they can cost people their lives.
We’ve got to call this out because preventing future tragedies like this one will depend entirely on holding her accountable. It’s not Noem, or Trump, or their billionaire donors that pay the price for this kind of thing. It’s regular people, and in this case a lot of Trump’s own supporters.
We owe it to the victims, their families, and the American people to make sure we do everything we can to prevent this from happening again.
But this is Trump’s presidency. They won’t give us anything if we don’t force them to. So we need to join together, make some noise, build pressure and DEMAND that this gets the attention it deserves. We can’t settle for anything less.
[**Please, join me in demanding an investigation into Kristi Noem’s leadership at FEMA. The buck stops with her, and it’s time she answers for what she’s done.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/noem_em_july25/?source=em250714-1-160&akid=3918%2E734936%2ExUIhPd) Thanks. More soon. Ruben
Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=1&akid=3918%2E734936%2ExUIhPd). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=3918%2E734936%2ExUIhPd). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=3918_734936_xUIhPd&akid=3918%2E734936%2ExUIhPd)

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Justice Department Reports to Court It Is Reviewing FBI/DOJ Epstein Records for Possible Release
body:
Judicial Watch announced it filed a “joint status report” on July 7 in federal court reporting that the Justice Department and the FBI continue to search for and review records in response to Judicial Watch’s Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit for records regarding Jeffrey Epstein.

In fiscal year 2024 nearly 42 million low-income households got food stamps at a cost of around $94 billion. A substantial chunk of approximately $10 billion annually is paid out fraudulently and without proper intervention the figure will only grow, according to a recent academic study. “Despite a 350 percent increase in spending on efforts to improve program integrity over the past decade, waste and fraud—particularly from benefit trafficking and eligibility misreporting—remain pervasive,” researchers found. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced it filed a “joint status report” on July 7 in federal court reporting that the Justice Department and the FBI continue to search for and review records in response to Judicial Watch’s Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit for records regarding Jeffrey Epstein. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jul 14, 2025 ---|---|--- | | | | RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" \- Sean Hannity Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Today's Top Stories | | | | | “The Justice Department and FBI are sending out contradictory messages: telling the American people that no more Epstein material will be released, while telling the federal court in our case that the Epstein FOIA review is proceeding,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “But no matter, our FOIA lawsuit for the Epstein material continues. We will be relentless in demanding transparency under law.” ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced today it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for all records from the Offices of Attorney General, Deputy Attorney General, and Associate Attorney General regarding Joe Biden’s controversial pardon of Hunter Biden (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of State (No. 1:25-cv-02143)). ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for all interviews, conversations and other records provided to the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) by Jeffrey Epstein victim Virginia Louise Giuffre (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice (No. 1:25-cv-02191)). ---|--- | | | | | Fraud and corruption are so rampant within the nation’s mammoth food stamp program that the government is quietly investing millions of dollars in a special initiative aimed at cracking down on the waste that has long plagued it. In fiscal year 2024 nearly 42 million low-income households got food stamps at a cost of around $94 billion. A substantial chunk of approximately $10 billion annually is paid out fraudulently and without proper intervention the figure will only grow, according to a recent academic study. “Despite a 350 percent increase in spending on efforts to improve program integrity over the past decade, waste and fraud—particularly from benefit trafficking and eligibility misreporting—remain pervasive,” researchers found. ---|--- | | | The Hill President Trump’s America-first agenda, backed by the tens of millions who elected him, can only move forward if senators actually do their jobs by voting on the president’s nominees to top government positions. Shamefully, almost 100 non-judicial nominees that have already been approved by Senate committees still await a vote by the full Senate. Without these appointees in place, unelected bureaucrats can run things unchecked, undermining the president’s priorities. Washington Examiner “The FBI’s search efforts are ongoing,” said a newly released “joint status report” to U.S. District Court which is managing a Freedom of Information Act lawsuit from Washington-based Judicial Watch. Tom Fitton, the president of Judicial Watch, highlighted the confusion that the joint status report has added to the controversy. Washington Examiner Urged to take action by Washington-based legal watchdog Judicial Watch, President Donald Trump’s top civil rights adviser said she was open to digging into the Academy’s 2020 quota requirements, suggesting that the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission would take the lead. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2025, All Rights Reserved |

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Bad news for Ohio families
body:
Friend, Trump's budget is a giveaway for billionaires and an attack on working people.

| |
---
Friend — Trump's budget is very bad news for working people and Ohio families. **It cuts healthcare, food for working families and seniors, and directly worsens health coverage for 40,000 people across Northwest Ohio and nearly 14 million families nationwide.** All to give billionaires another handout. Since taking office, Trump has done everything in his power to roll back the transformative investments we've made in our communities over the last four years. He's cut funding for infrastructure improvements, healthcare, environmental protection, and more. [**Friend, we need a government that invests in working people, not billionaires.
