Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=9316%2E2526796%2ERdEzqe)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=9316%2E2526796%2ERdEzqe)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
clean_body: There is no action too small. Please do not fall for the illusion or the lie that any action is too small. There is no action too small. In fact, when millions of us do tiny things, we can disrupt these systems. I'm not saying that getting in the game is going 100% to change the outcome, but it may, because we are in an unprecedented time. The unprecedented time can mean, of course, many bad things happen — but it can also mean that unpredictable things can happen, and can even go our way. I was elected in the first Trump administration and nobody ever, ever thought that I had a prayer in order to win. I was a waitress. I was challenging the head of a political machine who was supposed to be the next Speaker of the House. They spent $3 million against me while I was wiping down tables, and we won. Why? Because an unpredictable window has opened. Do not comply in advance. You try anyway. We will not be afraid – because that’s what they want. But our movement for real progress will have to push harder than ever these next four years. In solidarity, Alexandria | ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: MAGA’s reaction to our resistance is priceless
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250714-5241-footer&t=1001&akid=5241%2E420207%2EchgdSR ]Pramila Jayapal

Peter,
we're barely halfway through the summer and
Pramila has already come under fire from the White House and Fox News on
three separate occasions. It turns out our resistance is striking a nerve!

FIRST Stephen Miller accused her of being in “open rebellion” against the
country for speaking up for immigrants:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250714-1?refcode=em20250714-5241&refcode2=5241_420207_chgdSR&akid=5241%2E420207%2EchgdSR ]A tweet from Stephen Miller, in which he quote-tweets a video of
Pramila speaking at a protest, and adds "The Democrat Party is in open
rebellion against the United States of America."

THEN the White House called Pramila a “deranged leftist” for telling the
truth about ICE’s unconstitutional and illegal pattern of disappearing
people with no explanation:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250714-1?refcode=em20250714-5241&refcode2=5241_420207_chgdSR&akid=5241%2E420207%2EchgdSR ]A screenshot from CNN with a quote from the White House reading
"Dangerous smears by deranged leftists like Jayapal radicalize their
supporters to violently attack and obstruct federal law enforcement..."

AND Fox News tried to foment fear about our Resistance Lab grassroots
trainings, saying “General Jayapal” is “whipping her army into shape” to
resist Trump:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250714-1?refcode=em20250714-5241&refcode2=5241_420207_chgdSR&akid=5241%2E420207%2EchgdSR ]A screenshot of Fox News with a chyron reading "Dems Train Radicals In
'Resistance Labs'" and a photoshopped image of Pramila wearing war paint.

NOW we’re counting on your grassroots support to keep on resisting!
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250714-1?refcode=em20250714-5241&amount=3&refcode2=5241_420207_chgdSR&akid=5241%2E420207%2EchgdSR ]Will you pitch in $3 to help us reach our mid-month
goal, keep getting under their skin, and continue organizing to protect
our democracy?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250714-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250714-5241&refcode2=5241_420207_chgdSR&akid=5241%2E420207%2EchgdSR ]Contribute

They’re coming after us because they know our resistance is working. So
far more than 10,000 people in all 50 states have participated in the
Resistance Lab, and with your help we’re going to make sure that number
keeps growing.

So thank you for your support,
Peter. Let’s keep it up!

— Team Jayapal

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250714-5241-footer&t=1002&refcode2=5241_420207_chgdSR&akid=5241%2E420207%2EchgdSR

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5241%2E420207%2EchgdSR

Hi Peter,
We’re building something big—and we want you to be part of it.
Jena Griswold is running for Attorney General to defend our rights, stand up to MAGA extremism, and protect the Colorado way of life. But this fight isn’t just Jena’s—it’s all of ours.
Grassroots energy will make the difference in this campaign, and July is the perfect time to jump in and get involved.
Whether you’ve got 5 minutes or a few hours, there’s a way for you to help:
✅ Sign up to volunteer [https://secure.ngpvan.com/nLaGn7kiGEqBEIxGQjkLng2]

→ Facebook [http://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/]

→ Threads [http://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold]
→ Bluesky [http://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]
✅ Share why you’re supporting Jena with your friends and neighbors
✅ Chip in to help us reach more voters [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg?refcode=250714-email]
Together, we can protect democracy, defend our freedoms, and keep Colorado moving forward.
Thanks for being part of this movement,
Team Jena

name: Families First via Care in Action team
subject: Show Congress it Must Put Families First – July 26
body:
Republicans just handed a gift to billionaires and ICE at our expense – here’s how we hold them accountable.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111474259/557381253/664783965?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=partner_ndwa&ms=c4-families-first-find-event-1-july-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4OWY0ZS0wNjYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGM_e4aj1LdGHxg7DnRv2PkivulgeFQAOH5IyjRXDww=&emci=513e1ab7-da60-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8ed89f4e-0661-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=864787)
When Republicans in Congress voted to slash Medicaid funding, rip healthcare away from millions of people, and threaten the livelihoods of domestic workers across the country, we knew our response needed to be bigger than ever.
**Which is why we’ve joined forces with the biggest grassroots groups across the country to come together on July 26 to show the Republican lawmakers who supported Trump’s cruelty over their constituents' calls for compassion that their votes were _unacceptable._ **
In just 12 days, Families First Mobilizations across the country will send an undeniable message: these heartless cuts will have real consequences on millions of families across the country. And by coming together in massive numbers, **we’ll show Republicans who voted for this cruel bill that they cannot vote to unleash this kind of harm on our families without being held accountable.**
[**Will you save the date and join us?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111474261/557381254/-792613724?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=partner_ndwa&ms=c4-families-first-find-event-1-july-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4OWY0ZS0wNjYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGM_e4aj1LdGHxg7DnRv2PkivulgeFQAOH5IyjRXDww=&emci=513e1ab7-da60-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8ed89f4e-0661-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=864787)
[Save the Date](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111474263/557381256/-792613724?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=partner_ndwa&ms=c4-families-first-find-event-1-july-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4OWY0ZS0wNjYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGM_e4aj1LdGHxg7DnRv2PkivulgeFQAOH5IyjRXDww=&emci=513e1ab7-da60-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8ed89f4e-0661-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=864787)
[ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111474265/557381258/-792613724?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=partner_ndwa&ms=c4-families-first-find-event-1-july-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ4OWY0ZS0wNjYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGM_e4aj1LdGHxg7DnRv2PkivulgeFQAOH5IyjRXDww=&emci=513e1ab7-da60-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8ed89f4e-0661-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=864787)
**People in every corner of the country will feel the harm of Medicaid cuts** , including the tens of millions of children, people with disabilities, and older adults no longer able to get the care that allows them to live with dignity in their communities.
But that’s not all. The budget bill’s massive increase in ICE funding means immigrant families will face even more inhumane deportations and raids. All while care workers who provide essential support to our loved ones and strengthen our communities and economy suffer.
Make no mistake: Republicans in Congress voted to give a massive payout to billionaires and ICE off the backs of our communities and our families. Which is why it's _essential_ that we **ramp up our organizing to show Republican lawmakers who voted for this bill that they will face consequences at the ballot box.**
In 12 days, our **Families First Mobilization will take place in 50 states across the country, bringing families together alongside thousands of domestic workers and allies to send a clear, direct message to our leaders: you will pay for your vote to put billionaires over families.**

clean_body: Republicans just handed a gift to billionaires and ICE at our expense – here’s how we hold them accountable. When Republicans in Congress voted to slash Medicaid funding, rip healthcare away from millions of people, and threaten the livelihoods of domestic workers across the country, we knew our response needed to be bigger than ever. Which is why we’ve joined forces with the biggest grassroots groups across the country to come together on July 26 to show the Republican lawmakers who supported Trump’s cruelty over their constituents' calls for compassion that their votes were unacceptable. In just 12 days, Families First Mobilizations across the country will send an undeniable message: these heartless cuts will have real consequences on millions of families across the country. And by coming together in massive numbers, we’ll show Republicans who voted for this cruel bill that they cannot vote to unleash this kind of harm on our families without being held accountable. People in every corner of the country will feel the harm of Medicaid cuts , including the tens of millions of children, people with disabilities, and older adults no longer able to get the care that allows them to live with dignity in their communities. But that’s not all. The budget bill’s massive increase in ICE funding means immigrant families will face even more inhumane deportations and raids. All while care workers who provide essential support to our loved ones and strengthen our communities and economy suffer. Make no mistake: Republicans in Congress voted to give a massive payout to billionaires and ICE off the backs of our communities and our families. Which is why it's essential that we ramp up our organizing to show Republican lawmakers who voted for this bill that they will face consequences at the ballot box. In 12 days, our Families First Mobilization will take place in 50 states across the country, bringing families together alongside thousands of domestic workers and allies to send a clear, direct message to our leaders: you will pay for your vote to put billionaires over families. As always, thanks for all you do, The Care in Action Team

body:
These anti-democracy actors are not going to like this.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111474382/557381801/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxZDg5ZjRlLTA2NjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PQLmhJ8Jz_tf6vtgl6LqDIaUK__EvSiXTCGAxjblFVw=&emci=7be41db4-ce60-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=71d89f4e-0661-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)

Hey Peter, Republicans have continuously given themselves artificial power so they can advance right-wing priorities that are out of touch with the majority of Americans. As relentless defenders of democracy, we work to hold those bad actors accountable, at the ballot box and in the public eye, so we are excited to launch **The NDRC Map of Shame. ** We’re calling out the worst offenders — the most galling efforts to manipulate our democracy, cling to unearned power, and undermine the will of the people. This initiative will expose how anti-voter extremists are actively working to dismantle fair representation as a part of a coordinated effort by Republicans across the country — on both the state and federal levels. **Our first ever NDRC Map of Shame offender is... 🥁Florida’s Congressional Map championed by Governor Ron DeSantis of Florida!** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111474384/557381804/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MapOfShame_email_202050714-NDRC-Tier1-MapOfShame_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050714-NDRC-Tier1-MapOfShame_&utm_campaign=MapOfShame&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxZDg5ZjRlLTA2NjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PQLmhJ8Jz_tf6vtgl6LqDIaUK__EvSiXTCGAxjblFVw=)

[**The NDRC is holding anti-democracy actors accountable for their efforts to undermine voters. Donate to power our work.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111474387/557381809/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MapOfShame_email_202050714-NDRC-Tier1-MapOfShame_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050714-NDRC-Tier1-MapOfShame_&utm_campaign=MapOfShame&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxZDg5ZjRlLTA2NjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PQLmhJ8Jz_tf6vtgl6LqDIaUK__EvSiXTCGAxjblFVw=)
Ron DeSantis has boasted a shameful record of suppressing the will of the people, championing and signing multiple laws that restrict voting rights and attack democracy.
Breaking down his anti-voter tenure is a bit of a doozy, so bear with us:
**DeSantis Undermines Amendment 4**
**In 2018,** Floridians voted to pass Amendment 4 to restore voting rights to roughly 1 million former felons in Florida. **But in 2019** , DeSantis and his extremist allies undercut the amendment through S.B. 7066, which required a full payment of all fines and fees before voting rights were restored. With no way of tracking debts and many unable to afford the fines, an estimated 774,000 Floridians were blocked from registering.
**DeSantis Targets Vote-by-Mail and Voter Assistance**
**In 2021,** DeSantis signed S.B. 90 into law, restricting several voting access points. It barred non-poll workers from handing out food and water to folks waiting in line, shortened the window for absentee ballot requests, and imposed restrictions on the ballot drop box period. A judge ruled that this did violate the Voting Rights Act (VRA), but far-right Floridian officials challenged the decision. The case is under review in a federal appeals court.
**DeSantis Weaponizes Voter Fraud Hysteria**
**In 2022,** DeSantis signed S.B. 524 into law, which banned ranked choice voting and imposed stricter ID requirements for mail-in ballots. At his urging, the law also created an election police force to investigate supposed fraud. Shortly after its enactment, 20 people were arrested for allegedly casting illegal ballots. But it was soon discovered that many of these individuals genuinely thought they were eligible and even received voter registration cards from DeSantis’ administration. It was a clear move to attempt to scare voters.
That same year, DeSantis gutted a Black opportunity district by pushing a discriminatory congressional map that deliberately split Black voters in North Florida — dividing them across districts and disenfranchising them intentionally. Our fair maps movement built public opposition to the map, and despite a ruling that said the map violated the Florida Constitution, the map was able to be used in the 2022 election and was still upheld by the Florida Appeals Court.
**A DeSantis Power Grab**
**In 2023,** after local prosecutors and judges rejected many of DeSantis’ election crime cases, he pushed through S.B. 4B, which gave his anti-voter extremist buddy, the Republican Attorney General, control over these cases. It was a blatant power grab to bypass any checks and balances to advance his efforts to suppress voters.
**DeSantis Targets Petition Drives in Attack on Direct Democracy**
**Just two months ago, in May,** DeSantis signed H.B. 1205 into law, which creates unnecessary restrictions on who can circulate petitions, adds cumbersome ID requirements, and subjects groups to extreme penalties for simple administrative mistakes that could even result in prison time.
**We know this was a lot to take in Hey Peter, but unfortunately for them, radicals like DeSantis deserve all of the heat we’re bringing. **
[**By making a donation to the NDRC, you’re powering our fight against extremists like Ron DeSantis. Our Map of Shame is just getting started, and with your support, we’ll expose attacks on free and fair elections and hold anti-democracy politicians accountable in every area across the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111474390/557381812/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MapOfShame_email_202050714-NDRC-Tier1-MapOfShame_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050714-NDRC-Tier1-MapOfShame_&utm_campaign=MapOfShame&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxZDg5ZjRlLTA2NjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PQLmhJ8Jz_tf6vtgl6LqDIaUK__EvSiXTCGAxjblFVw=)

clean_body: These anti-democracy actors are not going to like this. | Hey Peter, Republicans have continuously given themselves artificial power so they can advance right-wing priorities that are out of touch with the majority of Americans. As relentless defenders of democracy, we work to hold those bad actors accountable, at the ballot box and in the public eye, so we are excited to launch The NDRC Map of Shame. We’re calling out the worst offenders — the most galling efforts to manipulate our democracy, cling to unearned power, and undermine the will of the people. This initiative will expose how anti-voter extremists are actively working to dismantle fair representation as a part of a coordinated effort by Republicans across the country — on both the state and federal levels. Our first ever NDRC Map of Shame offender is... 🥁Florida’s Congressional Map championed by Governor Ron DeSantis of Florida! | = = Ron DeSantis has boasted a shameful record of suppressing the will of the people, championing and signing multiple laws that restrict voting rights and attack democracy. Breaking down his anti-voter tenure is a bit of a doozy, so bear with us: DeSantis Undermines Amendment 4 In 2018, Floridians voted to pass Amendment 4 to restore voting rights to roughly 1 million former felons in Florida. But in 2019 , DeSantis and his extremist allies undercut the amendment through S.B. 7066, which required a full payment of all fines and fees before voting rights were restored. With no way of tracking debts and many unable to afford the fines, an estimated 774,000 Floridians were blocked from registering. DeSantis Targets Vote-by-Mail and Voter Assistance In 2021, DeSantis signed S.B. 90 into law, restricting several voting access points. It barred non-poll workers from handing out food and water to folks waiting in line, shortened the window for absentee ballot requests, and imposed restrictions on the ballot drop box period. A judge ruled that this did violate the Voting Rights Act (VRA), but far-right Floridian officials challenged the decision. The case is under review in a federal appeals court. DeSantis Weaponizes Voter Fraud Hysteria In 2022, DeSantis signed S.B. 524 into law, which banned ranked choice voting and imposed stricter ID requirements for mail-in ballots. At his urging, the law also created an election police force to investigate supposed fraud. Shortly after its enactment, 20 people were arrested for allegedly casting illegal ballots. But it was soon discovered that many of these individuals genuinely thought they were eligible and even received voter registration cards from DeSantis’ administration. It was a clear move to attempt to scare voters. That same year, DeSantis gutted a Black opportunity district by pushing a discriminatory congressional map that deliberately split Black voters in North Florida — dividing them across districts and disenfranchising them intentionally. Our fair maps movement built public opposition to the map, and despite a ruling that said the map violated the Florida Constitution, the map was able to be used in the 2022 election and was still upheld by the Florida Appeals Court. A DeSantis Power Grab In 2023, after local prosecutors and judges rejected many of DeSantis’ election crime cases, he pushed through S.B. 4B, which gave his anti-voter extremist buddy, the Republican Attorney General, control over these cases. It was a blatant power grab to bypass any checks and balances to advance his efforts to suppress voters. DeSantis Targets Petition Drives in Attack on Direct Democracy Just two months ago, in May, DeSantis signed H.B. 1205 into law, which creates unnecessary restrictions on who can circulate petitions, adds cumbersome ID requirements, and subjects groups to extreme penalties for simple administrative mistakes that could even result in prison time. We know this was a lot to take in Hey Peter, but unfortunately for them, radicals like DeSantis deserve all of the heat we’re bringing. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks, NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. | | Peter, I’ve gotten a lot of pushback since I first announced I was running for Congress. People said I was too young. That I didn’t look or act like a Congressman. That my legislative priorities were too pie-in-the-sky. But there’s one subject Republicans can’t get _enough_ of attacking me for: not being rich. What they don’t realize is that their favorite attack line is actually something we need _more_ of. **We need and deserve young, working, everyday people in Congress who know firsthand the struggles of the working class – and I’m proud to represent us. But increasing our ranks means building an unbeatable organizing movement, and to do that, I need as much grassroots support as I can get. I need _you_ , Peter.** [**_If you believe in having representatives who can _actually_ represent the lives real people live, will you chip in to my campaign right now? I’ll never apologize for having humble beginnings – because my family _fought_ to give me what chances I’ve had. My abuela, mom, and aunt fled Cuba in the 1960s with no money, and without knowing English. My abuela worked multiple factory jobs just to give her kids a better shot.
It’s her legacy I’m carrying forward when I walk onto the House floor, Peter. Because working people know – we’re in this together.
But let’s be real: You shouldn’t have to be working class to care about working class _priorities._ **You don’t need to be rejected by an apartment, or become houseless, or drive Uber to make ends meet – all of which I’ve done – to know that our economy isn’t working for everybody. You just have to care.
**
[**_I’m fighting to stay in Congress because I care, Peter. But the born-rich Republican donor class hates that, and will spend whatever it takes to hold me back. I need your help to stay here and build the world we deserve _despite_ them. clean_body: | ~ | | Peter, I’ve gotten a lot of pushback since I first announced I was running for Congress. People said I was too young. That I didn’t look or act like a Congressman. That my legislative priorities were too pie-in-the-sky. But there’s one subject Republicans can’t get enough of attacking me for: not being rich. What they don’t realize is that their favorite attack line is actually something we need more of. We need and deserve young, working, everyday people in Congress who know firsthand the struggles of the working class – and I’m proud to represent us. But increasing our ranks means building an unbeatable organizing movement, and to do that, I need as much grassroots support as I can get. I need you , Peter. ~ | ~ I’ll never apologize for having humble beginnings – because my family fought to give me what chances I’ve had. My abuela, mom, and aunt fled Cuba in the 1960s with no money, and without knowing English. My abuela worked multiple factory jobs just to give her kids a better shot. It’s her legacy I’m carrying forward when I walk onto the House floor, Peter. Because working people know – we’re in this together. But let’s be real: You shouldn’t have to be working class to care about working class priorities. You don’t need to be rejected by an apartment, or become houseless, or drive Uber to make ends meet – all of which I’ve done – to know that our economy isn’t working for everybody. You just have to care. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | ~~ In this together, Maxwell | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. name: Janelle Stelson
subject: Help me fire extremist Scott Perry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92069?t=6&akid=20597%2E878179%2EpSs3S8) Hi there. I'm Janelle Stelson, the Democrat running to oust Scott Perry in PA-10 — a major tossup district.

In 2024, this was the second closest challenger race in the entire country — **_we lost by just 5,133 votes._** We can flip this district from red to blue this time, but it is going to take every single one of us. [If you would like to help oust extremist Scott Perry and be a part of the movement to flip PA-10 blue, could you split a donation between myself and the Voter Protection Project right now? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92069?t=7&akid=20597%2E878179%2EpSs3S8) | [Flip PA-10 blue »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92069?t=8&akid=20597%2E878179%2EpSs3S8)
---
If my name and face are familiar, it's not just because I ran for Congress in 2024.

For more than 30 years, I was a TV news anchor, uplifting the stories of Central Pennsylvanians. I flew over New York City with the Pennsylvania National Guard after 9/11, delivered the heartbreaking news that _Roe v. Wade_ had been overturned on live television, and shared the stories of businesses closing, job losses, and families struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads.

**I am a dedicated truth teller with decades of experience standing up for our neighbors.**

Now I am working to replace former Freedom Caucus Chair and **_MAGA insurrectionist Scott Perry._**

❌ He has praised the GOP budget bill that just passed. You know — the one that will kick millions of hard-working Americans off Medicaid, shutter rural hospitals, and give tax cuts to the wealthy 1%.
❌ He has supported a national abortion ban with no exceptions.
❌ He helped plan the January 6th insurrection, where Americans lost their lives.

Scott Perry is too extreme for PA-10, and we deserve better.

**PA-10 is a make-or-break district to flip the U.S. House. We have a serious shot at winning this district, but my opponent is backed by mountains of dark money and billionaire donors. The support of grassroots donors like you is crucial to our success.**

[Now is when it counts. It is important that I raise as much money as possible in these first 24 hours to show Scott Perry and MAGA Republicans that Pennsylvanians want him OUT. Will you stand with me at this critical juncture by splitting a donation between myself and the Voter Protection Project right now? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92069?t=9&akid=20597%2E878179%2EpSs3S8)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Janelle Stelson and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92070?t=10&akid=20597%2E878179%2EpSs3S8)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92071?t=11&akid=20597%2E878179%2EpSs3S8)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92072?t=12&akid=20597%2E878179%2EpSs3S8)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92073?t=13&akid=20597%2E878179%2EpSs3S8)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92069?t=14&akid=20597%2E878179%2EpSs3S8)
Help us launch this campaign with the momentum we need to oust Scott Perry once and for all.

With gratitude,
Janelle
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20597%2E878179%2EpSs3S8). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20597%2E878179%2EpSs3S8).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20597%2E878179%2EpSs3S8) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=20597%2E878179%2EpSs3S8). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20597%2E878179%2EpSs3S8)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20597%2E878179%2EpSs3S8)

subject: If we got the text, voters did too
body:
Here’s how we respond.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111474580/557382530/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTBhODMyN2ItMDY2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NWWtaWpCBcTDe1F1MAr7X6NRWzg72U6ICL486uq8gZY=) | Hey Peter, Trump’s Super PAC is now texting voters in our district with attacks against Josh. I’ve been thinking about just how massive this problem really is. Think about it: If we got the text, that means they’re sending it to a massive audience, and tens of thousands of voters are seeing it too. **The other issue is that over 90% of people read text messages, so we know this attack is going to have a big impact if we don’t respond quickly.** The best way for us to respond is to ramp up our texting program and make sure voters are hearing from our campaign, too. We’re really proud of Josh for voting against Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” but now he’s being attacked personally because of it. It’s totally unfair. [_**We’d like to text 100,000 voters this week to combat these lies. We estimate that will cost $7,000. clean_body: Here’s how we respond. | = | Hey Peter, Trump’s Super PAC is now texting voters in our district with attacks against Josh. I’ve been thinking about just how massive this problem really is. Think about it: If we got the text, that means they’re sending it to a massive audience, and tens of thousands of voters are seeing it too. The other issue is that over 90% of people read text messages, so we know this attack is going to have a big impact if we don’t respond quickly. The best way for us to respond is to ramp up our texting program and make sure voters are hearing from our campaign, too. We’re really proud of Josh for voting against Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” but now he’s being attacked personally because of it. It’s totally unfair. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thanks for helping us get this done! – Mantra Dave *

He believes that honest people who welcome accountability and transparency are how we save the American Dream. Peter,

**They’re calling it the “Big Beautiful Bill.” But if you live in Alabama, you know better.**

It cuts funding to rural communities. It raises costs for working people. And it does _next to nothing_ to fix the actual problems we deal with every day — like broken roads, underfunded schools, and hospitals on the brink.

I’m sick of watching career politicians like Tommy Tuberville vote for garbage like this, then fly home to Florida and act like they’ve done something noble.

This bill is not beautiful. It’s a betrayal of working people.

**We’ve got a mid-month deadline coming up, and I want to show that real people in Alabama are stepping up._[Will you chip in $10, or whatever you can to help me fight back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111474771/557383017/-915612698?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_KS_20250714_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_Kyle_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGE0ODg0MDMtMDc2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2d-qrlwURb75p68CmAb2zZTlitRgz8hA4mAd_n1isnQ=)_** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

Hey folks,
This episode of Endless Urgency is an absolute must-watch.
I sat down with Katie Phang--brilliant journalist, content creator, and a member of the Democracy Defenders Fund--for one of the most honest, emotionally raw, and strategically sharp conversations we've ever had on this show.
We covered everything:
* The political fallout from the Epstein coverup--and why MAGA is scrambling
* Right-wing conspiracy loops and how they weaponize disinformation
* What Cuomo's potential independent run really means
* Accountability, high-information citizens, and the fight for basic truth
* Our broken health care system and personal stories of navigating it
* Why Democrats must reclaim the narrative on justice, dignity, and economic sanity

Katie doesn't hold back. Neither do I.
If you're looking for clarity, courage, and a blueprint for where we go next, this episode delivers.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..nNt-UWxwoRCfbNafT8q5UV4xxnc1pw_S0CuFjh3WX3A?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168335323)
With urgency,
Mike

Team, Arizona is one of the most competitive battlegrounds in the entire country. Voters here could decide control of the House of Representatives **and** the future of our democracy. Republicans know it too. They're already flooding our state with money, misinformation, and MAGA extremists, hoping to protect key districts and **hold onto their narrow grip on Congress.** But here’s the truth: if we invest early in Arizona, we can stop them. That means putting boots on the ground. Building a world-class grassroots organizing team. Talking to voters in every zip code, from Phoenix to Tucson to the most rural corners of our state. It’s not flashy. It’s the hard, unglamorous work of winning. And we need your help to do it. body:
|

Peter ,
The modern Republican Party isn’t trying to win a policy debate. It’s trying to settle a score.
And Donald Trump? He’s not campaigning to lead the country. He’s campaigning to punish it.
His second-term has been nothing but calculated vengeance:
* Pardoning violent insurrectionists from January 6
* Defunding Alzheimer’s research because Biden supported it
* Cutting life-saving medical programs for imaginary “woke” reasons
* Threatening to shut down Harvard because... who knows why
Meanwhile, Democrats are still playing defense. Still trying not to offend a single swing voter while the MAGA machine rewrites the rules and burns down the house.
But here’s the truth: we don’t have to match their cruelty to defeat them.
We just have to out-organize them, and that’s exactly what GOTV PAC is built to do.
🔥 Will you chip in $29 right now to help us mobilize the voters who will stop Trump and his MAGA cronies from seizing power again? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07142025&amount=29]

There’s a wide-open opportunity to drive a stake through the MAGA movement. But we can’t do it without grassroots support.
If you believe this country is worth fighting for -- not just defending --then we need you.
Let’s flip the House. Let’s stop Trump. Let’s take our country back.
-GOTV PAC

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.

name: Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: A peek behind the curtain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Why we’re working so hard to hit our fundraising goals right now. |
#
---
Hi, we wanted to take a moment to talk directly with the people powering this movement. Summer is the time when campaigns and organizations like ours get to work behind the scenes. We’re building lists, hiring summer fellows, planning early outreach to voters, and more. In short, we’re doing the prep work it takes to win elections, and it’s all happening right now. **But historically, summer is when donations dip.** Republicans know that too. They’re using this time to stockpile millions to try and flip Michigan red in 2026. **The truth is that we cannot match them dollar for dollar — but that’s never how Democrats win.** We win with people. We win with early, steady organizing. And we win with supporters like you fueling this work, even when it’s not driven by urgent headlines or Election Day. **Fight Like Hell PAC is working hard to build early resources to support Democrats up and down the ballot, defend Governor Whitmer’s progress, and keep Michigan blue.** Meeting our fundraising goals is a critically important piece to making our plan work. **Right now, we’re facing a downturn in fundraising. It’s not the end of the world, but we do need to turn things around so we can plan ahead.[If you’re able to help us get back on track, will you chip in any amount before tomorrow’s mid-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111475628/557385467/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250714_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmIyZjM1NzktMGI2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-0d4_8mjGF_EgxxWKuIIKSPXPXS-Ri0w10dg4lbEkts=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111475629/557385468/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250714_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmIyZjM1NzktMGI2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-0d4_8mjGF_EgxxWKuIIKSPXPXS-Ri0w10dg4lbEkts=)

clean_body: Why we’re working so hard to hit our fundraising goals right now. | Hi, we wanted to take a moment to talk directly with the people powering this movement. Summer is the time when campaigns and organizations like ours get to work behind the scenes. We’re building lists, hiring summer fellows, planning early outreach to voters, and more. In short, we’re doing the prep work it takes to win elections, and it’s all happening right now. But historically, summer is when donations dip. Republicans know that too. They’re using this time to stockpile millions to try and flip Michigan red in 2026. The truth is that we cannot match them dollar for dollar — but that’s never how Democrats win. We win with people. We win with early, steady organizing. And we win with supporters like you fueling this work, even when it’s not driven by urgent headlines or Election Day. Fight Like Hell PAC is working hard to build early resources to support Democrats up and down the ballot, defend Governor Whitmer’s progress, and keep Michigan blue. Meeting our fundraising goals is a critically important piece to making our plan work. Right now, we’re facing a downturn in fundraising. It’s not the end of the world, but we do need to turn things around so we can plan ahead.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, as always, for fighting like hell with us. — Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. name: Bryan
subject: July 14 Campaign Update
body:
Here Is An Update From Our Campaign

| | | | | [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=7722bb2890&e=e907534017)
| | | | | **July 14, 2025**
---
| Here’s an update from our campaign:
---
| | | | | Wisconsin always has close elections. In fact, nearly every fall statewide election since 2020 been decided by [**1%**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=d9d2065460&e=e907534017) , just 40,000 votes.
Our work to win Wisconsin doesn't start in 2026. It has already begun.
Last week, I [**joined**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=a006b6f309&e=e907534017)**** the Walworth County Republican Party to help support their efforts to keep Wisconsin red.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=c16d111edb&e=e907534017)
| Walworth is a strong conservative county that supported President Trump by more than [**60%**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5da38d9424&e=e907534017) in 2024. This is because of the strong grassroots work of the Walworth County GOP.
But there is always more we can do.
In a state where elections are decided by less than [**1%**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=60f479a9e8&e=e907534017) , every single vote counts. The conservative voters we turn out in places like Walworth County will offset the high number of Democrat votes from places like Madison.
I am proud to stand with the Walworth GOP and work to win Wisconsin once again this fall.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=93048c66e7&e=e907534017)
| I also stopped this weekend in [**Green County**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=ac0ed4e024&e=e907534017) for their annual picnic. In 2024, Green County was the closest county in the state, won by Democrats by just [**60 votes**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=c02df16c70&e=e907534017).
Areas like Green County are ready for Republican leadership and ready to flip Red. We need to spread our message, get out the vote, and work every day to win Wisconsin and deliver a conservative agenda.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=79963e6559&e=e907534017)
|
# Securing our Border
---
| This month, I voted with my colleagues to institute strong border security policies that protect our communities.
These include: Supporting [**$175 billion**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=497e915841&e=e907534017) to secure our border Providing [**$46 billion**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=cea2c72042&e=e907534017) to build the wall Hiring [**8,000**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=3f34f74091&e=e907534017) new customs and border agents
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=ac8a3ce632&e=e907534017)
| Unfortunately, radicals like my Democrat opponent Randy Bryce are opposing federal law enforcement and efforts to make our communities safer.
Bryce even called to [**abolish ICE**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=68d75a023b&e=e907534017) and referred to federal law enforcement as “[**Brownshirts**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=367dbce013&e=e907534017) ,” or Nazis.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=2db3e2d997&e=e907534017)
| Unlike my opponent, I will stand with the brave men and women of law enforcement.
I look forward to continuing my work to keep our communities safe and secure.
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil
---
| [DONATE](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=ae6ca521db&e=e907534017)
---
|
---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/steilforwisconsin/march-14051093?e=e907534017)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. * PO Box 103 * Oak Creek, WI 53154-8618 * USA
[update your preferences](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&e=e907534017&c=77b8710d88) or [unsubscribe](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&t=b&e=e907534017&c=77b8710d88)
---
|
---

name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: An update:
body:
---
Derek, Earlier this month, Donald Trump and the Republican Party sent a message to America: If you’re not a billionaire, we don’t give a damn about you. Health care for struggling families. Food in the pantry for hungry kids. Support for our elderly neighbors. Republicans abandoned those people as soon as they passed their Big, Ugly Bill — giving tax handouts to billionaires to buy another private jet while cutting basic lifelines for millions of people. We know the numbers: 17 million will lose health care, over 5 million will lose food assistance, and millions of hard-working folks will lose their jobs. **As Democrats, it’s up to us to make sure every voter knows who is responsible.** They need to know that Republicans voted to take food away from toddlers so billionaires can stuff wads of tax money into their already deep pockets. That’s why we’ve just launched a nationwide organizing initiative, Organizing Summer, to spread that message far and wide. We’re activating volunteers, registering voters, and building Democratic power _now_ , ahead of the 2025 elections and the 2026 midterms. This work is more important than it’s ever been. Because the only way we are going to check Trump’s power and stop more disastrous legislation like this from becoming our reality is by electing Democrats at all levels of government. To do that, I’m asking for your help. [**If you’re looking for a way to fight back against Trump, and this work is worth $3 to you, that’s the contribution I’m asking you to make to the DNC today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250714_3961_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3961_22930333_NpBJ1R&akid=3961%2E22930333%2ENpBJ1R) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250714_3961_fr&refcode2=3961_22930333_NpBJ1R&akid=3961%2E22930333%2ENpBJ1R)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20250714_3961_fr&refcode2=3961_22930333_NpBJ1R&akid=3961%2E22930333%2ENpBJ1R)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20250714_3961_fr&refcode2=3961_22930333_NpBJ1R&akid=3961%2E22930333%2ENpBJ1R)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20250714_3961_fr&refcode2=3961_22930333_NpBJ1R&akid=3961%2E22930333%2ENpBJ1R)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20250714_3961_fr&refcode2=3961_22930333_NpBJ1R&akid=3961%2E22930333%2ENpBJ1R)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250714_3961_fr&refcode2=3961_22930333_NpBJ1R&akid=3961%2E22930333%2ENpBJ1R)**
---
****
I’ve said from day one that Democrats need to get out of DC and organize everywhere — including in your own backyard — and that’s exactly what we’re doing: investing in state parties, hosting text and phone banks to support Democrats running in special elections, mobilizing thousands of volunteers, and laying the groundwork to take back Congress in 2026.
This work is only possible with grassroots donations. You might be surprised to hear this, but most of those donations come from emails just like this one. [**You can use this link to make a $3 contribution before midnight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250714_3961_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3961_22930333_NpBJ1R&akid=3961%2E22930333%2ENpBJ1R)
Thank you, and I’ll have more updates to share soon.
Ken
Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250714_3961_fr&refcode2=3961_22930333_NpBJ1R&akid=3961%2E22930333%2ENpBJ1R)
---

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Charlie Bailey
subject: Let’s do it again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia

Peter, it’s Charlie. We don’t have a shortage of MAGA Republicans in Georgia. And we certainly don’t have a shortage of Republicans who think they deserve a reward for doing nothing for the people they claim to represent. Buddy Carter. Burt Jones. Chris Carr. Marjorie Taylor Greene. They’ve always put Trump first, billionaires and big corporations second — and hardworking Georgians dead last. But this is also the state that gave us Stacey Abrams, Rev. Raphael Warnock, Sen. Jon Ossoff — a President for the people in Jimmy Carter, and a civil rights giant in John Lewis. Georgia is capable of achieving great things. And come 2026, the people of Georgia will once again choose progress over extremism. But we can’t take anything for granted — and we’re running out of time to hit our $15,000 mid-month fundraising goal. Peter, we need your help to lay the groundwork for critical gains across Georgia: to protect our Senate seat, elect proven Democratic champions, and move this state forward, not backwards. **It’s time to turn Georgia from a purple state to a blue stronghold once and for all.** But none of that works without you. [Will you rush a donation of $15 to the Democratic Party of Georgia before midnight tonight to help us build the movement Georgia and our nation need?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111475775/557386094/1328710725?amount=15&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_071425_MM4_D4_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGFiOTk5YS0wYzYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zmrVDsaGkBiRZOWN5ggN952w7EyTbWJa1Yzb8a_zi7g=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

body:
92% of Republicans are proud to be American — are you?

Peter,
I just saw the latest numbers from Gallup and had to contact you immediately. A staggering 92% of Republicans say they are proud to be an American, while a mere 36% of Democrats feel the same way.[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwNzE0X1FILVpRLjExMDExN190MTY2OTU4NS0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDcxNF9RSC1aUS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2Njk1ODUtMjg5OSJ9/fSDM8nrVMt5HH_PSmmrV6Q)This is a stark reminder of the divide in our country.
